webhooks.signatureDescription: Kila uwasilishaji unajumuisha kichwa cha Saini cha X-Webhook kilichotiwa saini na HMAC-SHA256 kwa kutumia siri ya webhook. Thibitisha saini kabla ya kuamini mzigo wa malipo.

wizard.step1Desc: Teua mfumo lengwa wa muunganisho wa webhook hii.

howItWorks.step1: Chagua mtoa huduma wa muunganisho (k.m. Slack, Discord, webhook maalum) na usanidi maelezo ya muunganisho.
howItWorks.step2: Sanidi matukio ya mfumo ya kujiandikisha (k.m. hitilafu za ukamilishaji, mibadala ya modeli, au vikomo vya matumizi).
howItWorks.step3: Thibitisha usanidi kwa kutuma payload ya jaribio ili kuhakikisha kuwa endpoint inaipokea.
howItWorks.step4: Linda endpoint yako kwa kuthibitisha header ya X-Webhook-Signature HMAC-SHA256 kwa kutumia siri ya webhook.
howItWorks.title: Jinsi Webhook Zinavyofanya Kazi
howItWorks.customOnly: Inatumika tu kwa miunganisho ya endpoint maalum.
howItWorks.hmacRecipe: Ili kuthibitisha payload za webhook katika Node.js, kokotoa HMAC-SHA256 ya bodi ghafi ya ombi ukitumia ufunguo wako wa siri. Ilinganishe na kichwa cha X-Webhook-Signature ukitumia timingSafeEqual.
howItWorks.timeoutNote: Uwasilishaji wa Webhook una muda wa ukomo wa sekunde 10.
howItWorks.retryNote: Uwasilishaji uliofeli hujaribiwa tena hadi mara 5 kwa exponential backoff.
howItWorks.docsLink: Soma mwongozo kamili wa msanidi programu wa Webhooks
howItWorks.hmacRecipePython: Uthibitishaji wa HMAC wa Python: hmac.new(secret, body, hashlib.sha256).hexdigest()
howItWorks.hmacRecipeBash: Uthibitishaji wa HMAC wa Bash: echo -n "$body" | openssl dgst -sha256 -hmac "$secret"

combos.description: Create model combos with weighted routing and fallback support
combos.autoCatalogDescription: Michanganyiko ya kiotomatiki/* iliyojengewa ndani imetatuliwa kutoka kwa watoa huduma waliounganishwa. Tumia kitambulisho chochote kati ya hivi kama sehemu ya kielelezo - hakuna usanidi unaohitajika.

combos.priorityDesc: Sequential fallback: tries model 1 first, then 2, etc.
combos.weightedDesc: Distributes traffic by weight percentage with fallback
combos.roundRobinDesc: Circular distribution: each request goes to the next model in rotation
combos.contextRelayDesc: Preserves session continuity with handoff summaries when accounts rotate
combos.randomDesc: Uniform random selection, then fallback to remaining models
combos.leastUsedDesc: Picks the model with fewest requests, balancing load over time
combos.costOptimizedDesc: Routes to the cheapest model first based on pricing
combos.resetAwareDesc: Husawazisha mgawo uliosalia dhidi ya saa 5 na uwekaji upya wa kila wiki, kisha uwekaji alama sawa
combos.strictRandomDesc: Shuffle deck — uses each model once before reshuffling
combos.fusionDesc: Inasambaza kidokezo kwa kila modeli ya jopo kwa sambamba, kisha modeli ya mwamuzi inasanisi jibu moja la mwisho
combos.fusionJudgeModelHelp: Modeli inayosanisi majibu ya jopo kuwa jibu moja la mwisho. Wacha wazi ili kutumia modeli ya kwanza ya jopo.
combos.fusionMinPanelHelp: Majibu ya jopo yaliyofanikiwa yanayohitajika kabla ya yale yanayochelewa kupata muda wa ziada (chaguo-msingi 2).
combos.fusionStragglerGraceMsHelp: Muda wa kusubiri modeli za jopo zilizo polepole mara tu akidi inapofikiwa (chaguo-msingi 8000).
combos.fusionPanelHardTimeoutMsHelp: Kikomo kabisa ili modeli moja iliyokwama isikwamishe jopo zima (chaguo-msingi 90000).
combos.contextRelayHandoffThresholdHelp: When quota usage reaches this threshold, OmniRoute generates a structured handoff summary before the active account is exhausted.
combos.contextRelayMaxMessagesHelp: Limits how much recent history is condensed into the relay summary.
combos.contextRelaySummaryModelHelp: Optional override model used only for generating the handoff summary. Leave empty to reuse the active combo model.
combos.contextRelayProviderNote: Context Relay currently generates handoffs for Codex account rotation. Pair it with multiple accounts of the same provider for the best continuity.
combos.advancedHint: Leave empty to use global defaults. These override per-provider settings.
combos.maxSetRetries: Kiwango cha Juu cha Kujaribu tena
combos.liveFleetDataHint: Data ya kundi inafika kupitia matukio ya combo ya moja kwa moja.
combos.liveDataHint: Data ya moja kwa moja inafika kupitia chaneli ya combo ya WebSocket.
combos.liveDisconnected: Moja kwa moja imezimwa — WebSocket imekatika. Inaonyesha hali ya mwisho inayojulikana.

priority.when: You have one preferred model and only want fallback on failure.
priority.avoid: You need request distribution across models.
priority.example: Primary coding model with cheaper backup for outages.

weighted.when: You need controlled traffic split across models.
weighted.avoid: You cannot maintain accurate weights over time.

round-robin.when: You want predictable and even distribution.
round-robin.avoid: Models differ too much in latency or cost.
round-robin.example: Same model on multiple accounts to spread throughput.

random.when: You want simple distribution with minimal setup.

least-used.when: You want adaptive balancing based on live demand.
least-used.avoid: Traffic is too low to benefit from usage balancing.
least-used.example: Mixed workloads where one model often gets overloaded.

cost-optimized.when: Cost reduction is your top priority.
cost-optimized.avoid: Pricing data is missing or outdated.
cost-optimized.example: Background or batch jobs where lower cost is preferred.

reset-aware.when: Unapitia akaunti nyingi ukitumia telemetry ya kiasi na madirisha tofauti ya kuweka upya.
reset-aware.avoid: Kiwango cha telemetry hakipatikani kwa akaunti nyingi.
reset-aware.example: Pendelea 60% ya kila wiki ya kuweka upya akaunti kesho juu ya 80% ya kuweka upya akaunti baadaye.

strict-random.when: Use when you want perfectly even spread — each model used once before repeating.
strict-random.avoid: Avoid when models have different quality or latency and order matters.
strict-random.example: Example: Multiple accounts of the same model to distribute usage evenly.

p2c.when: Use when you want low-latency selection using Power-of-Two-Choices algorithm.
p2c.avoid: Avoid for small combos with 2 or fewer models — no benefit over round-robin.
p2c.example: Example: High-throughput inference across 4+ equivalent model endpoints.

context-relay.when: Use when long sessions must survive account rotation without losing the working context.
context-relay.avoid: Avoid when account switching is rare or when you do not want extra summarization requests.
context-relay.example: Example: Codex sessions that rotate across multiple accounts near quota exhaustion.

fill-first.when: Use when you want to fully exhaust one provider's quota before moving to the next.
fill-first.avoid: Avoid when you need request-level load balancing across providers.
fill-first.example: Example: Use all $200 Deepgram credits before falling back to Groq.

auto.when: Use when you need multi-factor scoring routing based on cost, latency, and quality.
auto.avoid: Avoid when you need strict priority ordering or historical persistence.
auto.example: Example: Balance requests across models with different strengths.

lkgp.when: Use when you want to route based on historical success rates and performance.
lkgp.avoid: Avoid when historical data is limited or unreliable.
lkgp.example: Example: Route to models with a good track record on specific tasks.

context-optimized.when: Use when you need to optimize context window usage across models.
context-optimized.avoid: Avoid when models have similar context lengths or tasks are simple.
context-optimized.example: Example: Distribute long conversations across models with larger context windows.

advancedHelp.maxRetries: How many retries are attempted before failing a request.
advancedHelp.retryDelay: Initial wait between retries. Higher values reduce burst pressure.
advancedHelp.healthcheck: Skips unhealthy models/providers from routing decisions.
advancedHelp.concurrencyPerModel: Max simultaneous requests allowed per model in round-robin.
advancedHelp.queueTimeout: How long a request can wait in queue before timing out.
advancedHelp.failoverBeforeRetry: Inapowashwa, hitilafu yoyote ya mkondo wa juu husababisha kushindwa mara moja kwa shabaha ya mseto inayofuata, kuruka majaribio yote na URL mbadala.
advancedHelp.maxSetRetries: Idadi ya mara za kujaribu tena lengo kamili lililowekwa wakati kila lengo limeshindwa. 0 = hakuna kiwango cha kuweka tena.
advancedHelp.setRetryDelayMs: Kucheleweshwa kati ya majaribio ya kujaribu tena kiwango kilichowekwa, na kutoa muda wa kutatua masuala ya muda mfupi.
advancedHelp.disableSessionStickiness: Zungusha hadi kwenye muunganisho tofauti kwenye kila ombi badala ya kubandika mazungumzo yote kwenye muunganisho mmoja kwa kutumia hashi ya ujumbe wa kwanza. Hubatilisha chaguo-msingi la kimataifa. Acha kwenye Inherit ili kuhifadhi prompt-cache hits kwa soga za zamu nyingi.

priority.title: Fail-safe baseline
priority.description: Use one primary model and keep fallback chain short and reliable.
priority.tip1: Put your most reliable model first.
priority.tip2: Keep 1-2 backup models with similar quality.
priority.tip3: Use safe retries to absorb transient provider failures.

weighted.title: Controlled traffic split
weighted.description: Great for canary rollouts and gradual migration between models.
weighted.tip2: Keep the total at 100% and auto-balance after changes.
weighted.tip3: Monitor success and latency before increasing canary weight.

round-robin.title: Predictable load sharing
round-robin.description: Best when models are equivalent and you need smooth distribution.
round-robin.tip2: Set concurrency limits to avoid burst overload.
round-robin.tip3: Use queue timeout to fail fast under saturation.

random.title: Quick spread with low setup
random.description: Use when you need simple distribution without strict guarantees.
random.tip1: Use models with similar latency profiles.
random.tip2: Keep retries enabled to absorb random misses.
random.tip3: Prefer this for experimentation, not strict SLAs.

least-used.title: Adaptive balancing
least-used.description: Routes to less-used models to reduce hotspots over time.
least-used.tip2: Combine with health checks for safer balancing.
least-used.tip3: Track per-model usage to validate distribution gains.

cost-optimized.title: Budget-first routing
cost-optimized.description: Routes to lower-cost models when pricing metadata is available.
cost-optimized.tip1: Ensure pricing coverage for all selected models.
cost-optimized.tip2: Keep a quality fallback for hard prompts.
cost-optimized.tip3: Use for batch/background jobs where cost is the main KPI.

reset-aware.title: Weka upya-kufahamu mzunguko wa akaunti
reset-aware.description: Husawazisha mgao uliosalia wa mtoa huduma dhidi ya kuweka upya muda.
reset-aware.tip1: Tumia hatua za akaunti wazi au uelekezaji wa lebo ya akaunti kwa watoa huduma walio na kiwango cha telemetry.
reset-aware.tip2: Rejesha kipindi dhidi ya uzani wa kila wiki wakati uchovu wa muda mfupi ni hatari zaidi.
reset-aware.tip3: Weka bendi ndogo ili akaunti zinazolingana bado zizunguke kwa usawa.

strict-random.title: Shuffle deck distribution
strict-random.description: Each model is used exactly once per cycle before reshuffling.
strict-random.tip1: Use at least 2 models for meaningful distribution.
strict-random.tip3: Ideal for load balancing across multiple API accounts.

fill-first.description: Exhaust provider quotas sequentially before falling back.
fill-first.tip1: Use for quota-based routing with clear fallback chains.
fill-first.tip2: Set quotas accurately to avoid premature fallback.
fill-first.tip3: Works best with providers offering free tiers or credit buckets.
fill-first.title: Quota Exhaustion

auto.description: Route based on real-time scoring for cost, latency, quality, and health.
auto.tip1: Let the engine balance multiple factors automatically.
auto.tip2: Monitor which factors drive routing decisions in logs.
auto.tip3: Use for complex workloads where no single factor dominates.
auto.title: Multi-Factor Optimization

lkgp.description: Route based on historical performance and success patterns.
lkgp.tip1: Requires sufficient request history for accurate predictions.
lkgp.tip2: Good for workloads with consistent model performance patterns.
lkgp.tip3: Monitor prediction accuracy and adjust weights as needed.
lkgp.title: History-Based Routing

context-optimized.description: Optimize routing based on context window usage and token efficiency.
context-optimized.tip1: Route long conversations to models with larger context windows.
context-optimized.tip2: Monitor context utilization to avoid token waste.
context-optimized.tip3: Best for conversational AI requiring extensive context retention.
context-optimized.title: Context Optimization

context-relay.description: Best when account rotation is expected and the next account must inherit a simplified task summary.
context-relay.tip1: Use with providers rotating accounts for the same model family.
context-relay.tip2: Set handoff threshold below hard quota cutoffs for summary generation time.
context-relay.tip3: Only set a dedicated summary model if the primary is too expensive or unstable.
context-relay.title: Session Continuity Priority

p2c.description: Route to the provider with the lowest current load based on real-time metrics.
p2c.tip1: Monitor provider health metrics for accurate load assessment.
p2c.tip2: Works best with homogeneous provider pools.
p2c.tip3: Adjust sensitivity to avoid oscillation during traffic spikes.
p2c.title: Power of Two Choices

concept.title: Kumbukumbu ya Mazungumzo
concept.description: OmniRoute hujifunza kutoka kwa kila mazungumzo, ikikumbuka ukweli, matukio, taratibu, na dhana za kisemantiki zinazofanya majibu kuwa sahihi zaidi na yanayozingatia muktadha.
concept.howWorksContent:
1. Uchimbaji wa kiotomatiki: mwishoni mwa kila jibu, ukweli na matukio hutambuliwa na kuhifadhiwa kiotomatiki.
2. Urejeshaji: kabla ya kila jibu, kumbukumbu zinazofaa zaidi hutafutwa kupitia FTS5 (halisi), vekta (kisemantiki), au mseto wa RRF.
3. Uingizaji: kumbukumbu husika huingizwa kwenye muktadha wa msaidizi ili kuboresha ubora wa majibu.
4. Usimamizi: tumia ukurasa huu kutazama, kuhariri, kuhamisha, na kubana kumbukumbu za zamani.

Tumia kwa hatari yako mwenyewe.

providers.compatUpstreamHeadersHint: High-privilege setting — same trust level as editing provider API credentials; only trusted admins should use it. Merged after OmniRoute adds auth from the provider API key. If a custom header uses the same name as an existing one (e.g. Authorization), your value fully replaces the auto-generated header (including the Bearer token) — the upstream only sees what you typed, not the key from settings. Misconfiguration can cause 401 or broken upstream auth. One row per header (e.g. extra Authentication for some gateways). Hover or focus the value to preview. Saves on blur, outside click, or closing this panel.

providers.antigravityClientProfileHint: Chagua utambulisho gani wa mteja wa Antigravity ambao OmniRoute inawasilisha kwa API.

providers.antigravityProjectIdLabel: Kitambulisho cha Mradi wa Wingu la Google

providers.m365TierHint: Chagua ni kiolesura gani cha Microsoft 365 Copilot ambacho muunganisho huu unatumia. Binafsi ndiyo BizChat ya kawaida ya mtumiaji; Elimu na Biashara (kazi) huchagua violesura vya wapangaji wao.
providers.tierOverrideHelpText: Bandika mtoa huduma huyu kwenye kiwango cha uelekezaji badala ya kuruhusu OmniRoute kuamua kutoka kwa bei ya mfano.
providers.openaiResponsesStoreDescription: Allow compatible Responses API requests to preserve stored response state.
providers.rateLimitOverridesMaxConcurrentHint: Ubatilishaji wa maombi ya juu zaidi yanayofanyika kwa wakati mmoja kwa muunganisho huu. Hubatilisha kikomo cha kiwango cha akaunti.

providers.zedImportDescription: Gundua vitambulisho vya mtoa huduma wa AI (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Mistral, xAI) vilivyohifadhiwa na Zed IDE kwenye keychain ya OS na uviingize kama miunganisho. Zed IDE lazima iwe imesakinishwa kwenye mashine hii.
providers.zedNoCredentials: Hakuna vitambulisho vya Zed vilivyopatikana kwenye keychain
providers.zedUnsupportedCredentials: Imepata vitambulisho vya keychain {count}, lakini hakuna vilivyolingana na watoa huduma wanaoungwa mkono
providers.zedManualDescription: Tumia hii wakati OmniRoute inapoendesha kwenye Docker au keychain haipatikani. Bandika ufunguo wa API ambao Zed ilihifadhi chini ya <path>~/.config/zed/settings.json</path>, au unakili kutoka kwenye paneli ya mipangilio ya Zed AI.
providers.zedManualImportSuccess: Imeingiza tokeni ya {provider} kutoka kwa Zed
providers.grokImportDescription: Ingiza faili yako ya Grok Build <authPath>~/.grok/auth.json</authPath>. Unaweza kuipata kwa kuendesha <command>grok login</command> kwenye terminal yako.
providers.grokInvalidAuth: Hii si faili halali ya Grok Build auth.json. Ilitarajiwa object yenye ufunguo ulio na JWT.
providers.grokImportSuccess: Muunganisho wa Grok Build umeingizwa kwa mafanikio
providers.grokValidToken: Tokeni halali ya Grok Build imegunduliwa
providers.grokRefreshIncluded: Refresh token imejumuishwa — usasishaji wa tokeni kiotomatiki umewezeshwa
providers.grokRefreshMissing: Hakuna refresh token iliyopatikana — ingiza tena baada ya tokeni kuisha muda wake
providers.freeTierProviders: Watoa Huduma za Kiwango cha Bure
providers.freeTierProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma walio na viwango vya bure - wengine wanahitaji kujisajili kwa ufunguo wa API, wengine hawahitaji kitambulisho hata kidogo.
providers.ideProvidersDesc: Wahariri walio na usajili wa ndani wa AI. Tumia ukurasa wa mtoa huduma kuleta vitambulisho moja kwa moja kutoka kwa msururu wa vitufe wa IDE.
providers.noIdeProviders: Hakuna watoa huduma wa IDE wanaolingana na vichujio vya sasa.
providers.providerDetailFastTierTooltip: Tumia kiwango cha haraka cha Codex kwa miunganisho yote ya Codex kwa chaguo-msingi
providers.providerDetailValidClaudeCredentialsFile: Faili halali ya vitambulisho vya Claude
providers.providerDetailPathAutoDetectedAllOs: Njia hugunduliwa kiotomatiki kwa kila OS (Linux/Mac/Windows).
providers.providerDetailPathAutoDetected: Njia hugunduliwa kiotomatiki kwa kila OS (Linux/Mac).
providers.webFetchTooltip: Watoa huduma wanaochimba maudhui kutoka kwa URL za wavuti (HTML → Markdown, scrape, screenshot)
providers.compatibleProvidersDesc: Endpoints zinazooana na OpenAI na zinazooana na Anthropic unazohifadhi au kusanidi. Elekeza SDK yoyote ya OpenAI kwenye URL yako mwenyewe na uelekeze maombi hapa.
providers.oauthProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma waliothibitishwa kupitia OAuth — ingia mara moja na OmniRoute inashughulikia mzunguko wa tokeni kiotomatiki.
providers.webCookieProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma hawa hutumia vipindi vya wavuti vya kivinjari, vidakuzi, au tokeni za wavuti badala ya vitufe vya API. Fungua mtoa huduma ili kuongeza kitambulisho kinachohitajika cha kipindi.
providers.apiKeyProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma wa kawaida wa ufunguo wa API. Ongeza ufunguo wako mara moja na OmniRoute inaelekeza, inajaribu tena, na kuweka kikomo cha kasi kwa niaba yako.
providers.noAuthProvidersDesc: Endpoints wazi zisizohitaji vitambulisho — tayari kutumika mara moja bila kujisajili.
providers.upstreamProxyProvidersDesc: Elekeza trafiki inayotoka kupitia proksi ya juu kabla ya kufikia mtoa huduma. Ni muhimu kwa mitandao ya shirika au ukaguzi wa trafiki.
providers.webFetchProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma wanaochukua na kutoa maudhui kutoka kwa URL za wavuti. Zitumie kuweka msingi wa vidokezo kwa data ya moja kwa moja ya wavuti.
providers.aggregatorsGatewaysDesc: Wakusanyaji wa watoa huduma wengi na lango za AI zinazotoa API moja iliyounganishwa kwenye dazeni za miundo ya msingi.
providers.enterpriseCloudDesc: Miundo ya kiwango cha biashara na inayopangishwa kwenye wingu yenye SLA zilizoboreshwa, vyeti vya kufuata kanuni, na uwezo maalum.
providers.cloudAgentProvidersDesc: Mawakala huru wa wingu wanaotekeleza majukumu ya muda mrefu kwa idhini ya mpango na ufuatiliaji wa hali ya moja kwa moja.
providers.localProvidersDesc: Miundo inayojipangisha yenyewe inayofanya kazi kwenye maunzi yako mwenyewe. Hakuna data inayoondoka kwenye miundombinu yako.
providers.searchProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma wa utafutaji wa wavuti na hati. Waambatishe kwenye miito ya LLM kwa ajili ya Retrieval-Augmented Generation.
providers.audioProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma wa maandishi-hadi-hotuba na hotuba-hadi-maandishi kwa I/O ya sauti na mifereji ya unukuzi wa sauti.
providers.embeddingRerankProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma wa upachikaji wa vekta na upangaji upya kwa utafutaji wa kisemantiki, mifereji ya RAG, na ufungaji wa alama za ufanano.
providers.imageProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma wa uzalishaji wa picha na maono — tengeneza picha kutoka kwa maandishi au changanua zilizopo.
providers.videoProvidersDesc: Watoa huduma wa uzalishaji wa video. Tengeneza klipu fupi za video kutoka kwa vidokezo vya maandishi au picha.
providers.onboardingWizard: Mchawi wa Kuingia kwa Mtoa huduma
providers.onboardingWizardDescription: Unganisha ufunguo wa API, unaotumika na watoa huduma wa OAuth kwa uthibitishaji, uthabiti na jaribio la muunganisho la papo hapo.
providers.onboardingTypeApiKeyTitle: Mtoa huduma wa ufunguo wa API
providers.onboardingTypeApiKeyText: Tumia watoa huduma waliojengewa ndani kama vile OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, Azure, na zaidi.
providers.onboardingTypeCustomText: Unda ncha inayooana na OpenAI-, Anthropic-, au Claude Code na uongeze ufunguo wake.
providers.onboardingTypeOAuthText: Tumia tena OAuth iliyopo, msimbo wa kifaa, au mtiririko wa uingizaji wa ndani kwa watoa huduma wa usimbaji.
providers.onboardingChooseApiKeyProvider: Chagua mtoaji wa ufunguo wa API
providers.onboardingChooseProviderDescription: Chagua mtoa huduma, kisha mchawi atakuongoza kupitia vitambulisho na majaribio.
providers.onboardingSavingCompatibleConnection: Inahifadhi muunganisho unaooana wa mtoa huduma...
providers.onboardingCustomProviderFailed: Uingizaji wa mtoa huduma maalum haukufaulu
providers.onboardingOAuthNoConnectionFound: OAuth imekamilika, lakini hakuna muunganisho wa mtoa huduma uliopatikana.
providers.onboardingProviderSpecificIdPlaceholder: Kitambulisho cha hiari cha mtoa huduma mahususi
providers.onboardingCreateCustomCompatibleDescript: Mchawi huunda nodi ya mtoa huduma kwanza, kisha huhifadhi na kupima uunganisho wake wa ufunguo wa API.
providers.onboardingProviderPrefixHint: Hutumika kutengeneza kitambulisho cha mtoa huduma anayesimamiwa.
providers.onboardingOAuthFlowDescription: OmniRoute itafungua mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth kwa mtoa huduma huyu. Baada ya kuingia, mchawi hupakia tena muunganisho uliohifadhiwa na huendesha jaribio la muunganisho sawa na ukurasa wa mtoa huduma.

onboardingProviderDescriptions.360ai: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye ai.360.cn
onboardingProviderDescriptions.agentrouter: Pata salio la bure la $200 kwenye https://agentrouter.org/register — hakuna kadi ya mkopo inayohitajika.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.agnes: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye agnes-ai.com
onboardingProviderDescriptions.aimlapi: Kiwango cha bure kimesitishwa (2026) — AI/ML API sasa ni ya kulipia kadri unavyotumia pekee (kiwango cha chini cha kuongeza salio ni $20); hakuna salio la bure linalojirudia.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.ai21: Salio la majaribio la $10 wakati wa kujisajili (halali kwa miezi 3), hakuna kadi ya mkopo inayohitajika
onboardingProviderDescriptions.alibaba: Unganisha Alibaba kwa ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.alibaba-cn: Unganisha Alibaba (China) kwa ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.bailian-coding-plan: Unganisha Alibaba Coding Plan kwa ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.bedrock: Ujumuishaji asilia wa Bedrock: ugunduzi wa miundo unatumia miundo ya msingi ya Bedrock na wasifu wa makisio, huku gumzo likitumia API za kikanda za Bedrock Runtime Converse/ConverseStream.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.anthropic: Unganisha Anthropic kwa ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.api-airforce: Pata ufunguo wako wa API kutoka https://panel.api.airforce — endpoint inayooana na OpenAI kwenye https://api.airforce/v1
onboardingProviderDescriptions.arcee-ai: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye arcee.ai
onboardingProviderDescriptions.azure-ai: Foundry inatumia muundo wa OpenAI v1 wenye majina ya usambazaji kama miundo. OmniRoute inasawazisha URL za rasilimali ya mzizi kwenye endpoints za v1 chat na /models.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.azure-openai: Tumia ufunguo wako wa API wa Azure OpenAI. URL ya msingi inapaswa kuwa endpoint ya rasilimali yako, kwa mfano https://my-resource.openai.azure.com.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.bai: Ufunguo wa API wa Bearer kwa lango la LLM linalooana na OpenAI la b.ai (tofauti na TheB.AI). Fungua ufunguo kwenye https://docs.b.ai, kisha tumia https://api.b.ai/v1 kama URL ya msingi inayooana na OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.baichuan: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye platform.baichuan-ai.com
onboardingProviderDescriptions.baidu: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye console.bce.baidu.com
onboardingProviderDescriptions.qianfan: Tumia ufunguo wa API wa Qianfan kutoka Baidu AI Cloud. Endpoint chaguomsingi inaoana na OpenAI v2.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.baseten: Salio la majaribio la bure la $30 kwa makisio ya GPU
onboardingProviderDescriptions.bazaarlink: Fungua ufunguo wa bure wa API kwenye https://bazaarlink.ai — muundo 'auto:free' unaelekeza kwenye makisio yasiyo na gharama. Miundo yote inatumia muundo wa provider/model-name, k.m. xiaomi/mimo-v2.5-pro.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.black-forest-labs: Unganisha Black Forest Labs kwa ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.blackbox: Kiwango cha bure: gumzo la msingi lisilo na kikomo pamoja na Minimax-M2.5, hakuna kadi ya mkopo inayohitajika
onboardingProviderDescriptions.bluesminds: Pata ufunguo wako wa API kwenye https://www.bluesminds.com — endpoint inayooana na OpenAI kwenye https://api.bluesminds.com/v1 yenye salio la bure la kila siku. Miundo ya VIP (Claude Opus 4.5, Gemini 2.5 Pro) inatumia salio la pi.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.byteplus: Unganisha BytePlus ModelArk kwa ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.bytez: Salio la bure la $1, linasasishwa kila baada ya wiki 4
onboardingProviderDescriptions.cerebras: Majaribio ya Bure: tokeni 1M/siku, 30K TPM, 5 RPM — hakuna kadi ya mkopo.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.charm-hyper: Fungua ufunguo wa API kwenye https://hyper.charm.land, kisha ubandike hapa kama tokeni ya Bearer.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.chutes: Ufunguo wa API wa Bearer kwa lango linalooana na OpenAI la Chutes.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.clarifai: Clarifai hutoa gumzo, majibu na /models zinazoendana na OpenAI kwenye /v2/ext/openai/v1. Miundo ya umma/jumuiya kwa kawaida huhitaji PAT; funguo zenye upeo wa programu hufanya kazi tu kwa rasilimali zilizo ndani ya programu hiyo.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.cloudflare-ai: Inahitaji Tokeni ya API NA Kitambulisho cha Akaunti (kinapatikana kwenye dash.cloudflare.com)
onboardingProviderDescriptions.codestral: Unganisha Codestral kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.cohere: Majaribio ya Bure: Miito 1,000 ya API/mwezi kwa ajili ya majaribio, hakuna kadi ya mkopo inayohitajika
onboardingProviderDescriptions.command-code: Unda au nakili ufunguo wa API kutoka Command Code, kisha ubandike hapa kama tokeni ya Bearer.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.coze: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye coze.com/open/api
onboardingProviderDescriptions.crof: Unganisha CrofAI kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.databricks: Unganisha Databricks kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.datarobot: Lango chaguo-msingi huorodhesha miundo inayotumika kutoka /genai/llmgw/catalog/. URL za upelekaji pia zinatumika kwa maombi ya moja kwa moja ya gumzo yanayoendana na OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.deepinfra: Salio la bure la kujisajili kwa ajili ya majaribio ya API na uchunguzi wa miundo
onboardingProviderDescriptions.deepseek: Tokeni 5M za bure unapojisajili - hakuna kadi ya mkopo inayohitajika
onboardingProviderDescriptions.dgrid: Unda ufunguo wa API wa DGrid kwenye https://dgrid.ai, kisha tumia https://api.dgrid.ai/v1 kama URL ya msingi inayoendana na OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.dify: Pata ufunguo wa API kutoka kwenye instansi yako ya Dify.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.digitalocean: Unganisha DigitalOcean kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.dit: dit.ai (Distributed Intelligence Trade) ni kipanga njia/lango linaloendana na OpenAI lenye bei inayobadilika kwa kila ombi, likitoa /v1/chat/completions kwenye https://api.dit.ai/v1. OmniRoute hutumia itifaki ya OpenAI; uchanganuzi wa matumizi/akiba unapatikana kwenye dashibodi ya dit.ai.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.doubao: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye console.volcengine.com
onboardingProviderDescriptions.empower: Empower hutoa gumzo linaloendana na OpenAI kwenye https://app.empower.dev/api/v1 ikiwa na usaidizi wa kuita zana kwenye empower-functions.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.factory: Pata ufunguo wako wa API wa Factory kwenye https://app.factory.ai/settings/api-keys, kisha ubandike kama tokeni ya Bearer. Endpoint inayoendana na OpenAI kwenye https://api.factory.ai/v1.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.fal-ai: Unganisha Fal.ai kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.featherless-ai: Kiwango cha bure kinapatikana — hakuna kadi ya mkopo inayohitajika
onboardingProviderDescriptions.fenayai: Ufunguo wa API wa Bearer kwa ajili ya lango la FenayAI linaloendana na OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.firecrawl: Unganisha Firecrawl kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.fireworks: Salio la kuanzia la bure la $1 unapojisajili kwa ajili ya majaribio ya API
onboardingProviderDescriptions.freeaiapikey: Proksi ya API yenye punguzo kwa miundo 40+ ikijumuisha GPT-5, Claude Opus 4.6, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Qwen 3.5. Pata ufunguo wako wa API kwenye https://freeaiapikey.com/dashboard. URL ya Msingi: https://freeaiapikey.com/v1.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.freemodel-dev: Pata salio la bure la API la $300 kwenye https://freemodel.dev — hakuna maelezo ya malipo yanayohitajika. Endpoint inayoendana na OpenAI. Miundo ya GPT-5.4 na GPT-5.5 inapatikana.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.friendliai: Kiwango cha bure cha makisio yasiyo na seva — hakuna kadi ya mkopo inayohitajika
onboardingProviderDescriptions.gemini: Bure milele: maombi 1,500/siku kwa Gemini 2.5 Flash — hakuna kadi ya mkopo, pata ufunguo kwenye aistudio.google.com
onboardingProviderDescriptions.gigachat: Unganisha GigaChat (Sber) kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.github-models: Unda PAT ya GitHub yenye upeo wa 'models: read' kwenye github.com/settings/tokens
onboardingProviderDescriptions.gitlab: Tokeni ya ufikiaji wa kibinafsi ya GitLab kwa ajili ya API ya umma ya Code Suggestions. Sanidi URL ya msingi ya self-hosted wakati hutumii gitlab.com.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.gitlawb-gmi: Pata ufunguo wako wa API kutoka kwenye dashibodi ya Gitlawb Opengateway.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.gitlawb: Pata ufunguo wako wa API kutoka kwenye dashibodi ya Gitlawb Opengateway.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.glm: Unganisha GLM Coding kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.glm-cn: Unganisha GLM Coding (China) kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.glmt: Wasifu uliowekwa awali wa GLM wenye bajeti ya juu ya tokeni, kufikiri kumewashwa, na muda mrefu zaidi wa kuisha.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.getgoapi: Unganisha GoAPI kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.groq: Kiwango cha bure: 30 RPM / 14.4K RPD — hakuna kadi ya mkopo
onboardingProviderDescriptions.hackclub: Ingia ukitumia akaunti yako ya Hack Club kwenye ai.hackclub.com.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.haiper: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye haiper.ai/haiper-api
onboardingProviderDescriptions.heroku: Unganisha Heroku AI kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.hcnsec: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye api.hcnsec.cn
onboardingProviderDescriptions.huggingface: API ya bure ya inference kwa maelfu ya modeli (Whisper, VITS, SDXL…)
onboardingProviderDescriptions.hyperbolic: Salio la majaribio la $1-5 unapojisajili kwa ajili ya serverless inference
onboardingProviderDescriptions.watsonx: Lango la modeli la watsonx linaweka wazi /chat/completions na /models zinazoendana na OpenAI chini ya /ml/gateway/v1.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.ideogram: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye ideogram.ai/docs/api
onboardingProviderDescriptions.iflytek: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye console.xfyun.cn
onboardingProviderDescriptions.inference-net: Salio la bure la $25 unapojisajili pamoja na ruzuku za utafiti zinazopatikana
onboardingProviderDescriptions.jina-ai: Ufunguo wa API wa Bearer kwa ajili ya API ya Jina AI rerank.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.jina-reader: Unganisha Jina Reader kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.kenari: Kenari inaweka wazi kituo cha mwisho cha chat completions kinachoendana na OpenAI kwenye https://kenari.id/v1/chat/completions, pamoja na orodha ya moja kwa moja ya /v1/models inayojumuisha Claude, GPT, DeepSeek, GLM, Kimi na zaidi. OmniRoute hutumia itifaki ya OpenAI na kuorodhesha modeli kupitia passthrough.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.kie: Unganisha KIE.AI kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.kilo-gateway: Unganisha Kilo Gateway kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.kimi: Unganisha Kimi kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.kimi-coding-apikey: Unganisha Kimi Coding (API Key) kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.lambda-ai: Unganisha Lambda AI kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.laozhang: Unganisha LaoZhang AI kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.leonardo: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye leonardo.ai/developer
onboardingProviderDescriptions.liquid: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye liquid.ai
onboardingProviderDescriptions.llamagate: Unganisha LlamaGate kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.llm7: Inafanya kazi bila ufunguo wa API (tumia 'unused' kama ufunguo). Pata tokeni ya bure kwenye token.llm7.io kwa viwango vya juu zaidi.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.longcat: Bure: ruzuku ya mara moja ya tokeni 10M baada ya kujisajili kwa akaunti + uthibitishaji wa KYC (LongCat-2.0). Ni ya mara moja tu — si posho ya kila siku/mwezi inayojirudia.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.maritalk: Unganisha Maritalk kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.meta-llama: Unganisha Meta Llama API kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.minimax-cn: Unganisha Minimax (China) kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.minimax: Unganisha Minimax Coding kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.mistral: Kiwango cha Bure cha Majaribio: ufikiaji wenye kikomo cha kasi kwa modeli zote, hakuna kadi ya mkopo inayohitajika
onboardingProviderDescriptions.modal: Modal kwa kawaida huhudumia programu zinazopangishwa na mtumiaji zinazoendana na OpenAI kwenye /v1. OmniRoute itachunguza /v1/models na kuelekeza trafiki ya gumzo kwenye /v1/chat/completions.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.modelscope: Kiwango cha bure kupitia ModelScope API-Inference — akaunti ya Alibaba inahitajika.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.monsterapi: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye monsterapi.ai
onboardingProviderDescriptions.moonshot: Unganisha Moonshot AI kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.nanogpt: Unganisha NanoGPT kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.nebius: Salio la majaribio la ~$1 unapojisajili kwa ajili ya majaribio ya API
onboardingProviderDescriptions.nlpcloud: NLP Cloud hutumia API ya chatbot ya umiliki badala ya OpenAI chat/completions. OmniRoute hurekebisha ujumbe wa OpenAI kulingana na input/context/history na kuweka wazi orodha ya ndani ya modeli za chatbot zinazotumika.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.nomic: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye atlas.nomic.ai
onboardingProviderDescriptions.nous-research: Nous inaweka wazi muundo wa /v1 unaoendana na OpenAI wenye orodha kubwa ya mbali ya /models. Kituo cha mwisho cha /chat/completions kinahitaji ufunguo halali wa API kwa ajili ya programmatic inference.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.novita: Salio la majaribio la $0.50 unapojisajili (halali kwa takriban mwaka 1)
onboardingProviderDescriptions.nscale: Salio la bure la $5 unapojisajili kwa ajili ya majaribio ya inference
onboardingProviderDescriptions.nube: Unganisha Nube.sh kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.nvidia: Ufikiaji wa bure wa watengenezaji: ~40 RPM, modeli 70+ (Kimi K2.5, GLM 4.7, DeepSeek V3.2...)
onboardingProviderDescriptions.oci: OCI hutoa endpoints za gumzo na majibu zinazooana na OpenAI. Project ID ni ya hiari katika OmniRoute lakini inaweza kuhitajika kwa Responses na mitiririko ya kazi ya kiwakala.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.ollama-cloud: Unganisha Ollama Cloud kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.openadapter: OpenAdapter hutoa endpoint ya ukamilishaji wa gumzo inayooana na OpenAI katika https://api.openadapter.in/v1/chat/completions, ikijumuisha miundo 70+ ya chanzo huria (DeepSeek, Qwen, Kimi, MiniMax, GLM, Llama, Mistral, …). OmniRoute hutumia itifaki ya OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.openai: Unganisha OpenAI kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.opencode-go: Unganisha OpenCode Go kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.opencode-zen: Unganisha OpenCode Zen kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.openrouter: Miundo ya bure kwa $0/token yenye kiambishi tamati cha :free - 20 RPM / 200 RPD
onboardingProviderDescriptions.openvecta: Salio la bure unapojisajili kwa ajili ya makisio yanayooana na OpenAI kwenye LLM, embeddings, na miundo ya kutoa hoja
onboardingProviderDescriptions.orcarouter: Unda ufunguo wa API (huanza na sk-orca-) kwenye https://www.orcarouter.ai, kisha ubandike kama tokeni ya Bearer. Endpoint inayooana na OpenAI iko kwenye https://api.orcarouter.ai/v1.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.ovhcloud: Unganisha OVHcloud AI kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.perplexity: Unganisha Perplexity kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.piapi: Unganisha PiAPI kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.pioneer: Salio la bure la matumizi la $75 — hakuna kadi ya mkopo inayohitajika
onboardingProviderDescriptions.poe: Poe hutoa gumzo na majibu yanayooana na OpenAI kwenye https://api.poe.com/v1, ikiwa na ukaguzi wa salio uliothibitishwa kwenye /usage/current_balance.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.pollinations: Kiwango cha bure kisicho na ufunguo: openai, openai-fast, openai-large, qwen-coder, mistral, deepseek, grok, gemini-flash-lite-3.1, perplexity-fast, perplexity-reasoning. Miundo ya kulipia (claude, gemini, midijourney) inahitaji ufunguo wa API wa Pollinations kutoka enter.pollinations.ai.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.publicai: Inahitaji ufunguo wa API — salio la mara moja la kujisajili, kisha ya kulipia
onboardingProviderDescriptions.puter: Pata tokeni kwenye puter.com/dashboard → Copy Auth Token
onboardingProviderDescriptions.qiniu: Unda ufunguo wa API wa makisio ya Qiniu AI kwenye https://portal.qiniu.com/ai-inference/api-key, kisha ubandike hapa kama tokeni ya Bearer. Endpoint inayooana na OpenAI iko kwenye https://api.qnaigc.com/v1, ikifanya kazi kama proksi ya DeepSeek, Claude, Kimi na zaidi nyuma ya ufunguo mmoja.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.recraft: Unganisha Recraft kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.reka: Reka Chat inaoana na OpenAI kwenye /v1. OmniRoute huchunguza /v1/models na kuelekeza trafiki ya gumzo kwenye /v1/chat/completions.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.requesty: Unda ufunguo wa API kwenye https://app.requesty.ai, kisha ubandike hapa kama tokeni ya Bearer. Endpoint inayooana na OpenAI iko kwenye https://router.requesty.ai/v1, ikiwa na orodha ya moja kwa moja ya /v1/models.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.runwayml: Uzalishaji wa video wa Runway unategemea kazi. OmniRoute huwasilisha kazi za maandishi-hadi-video au picha-hadi-video, huangalia mara kwa mara /v1/tasks/[id], na kurekebisha matokeo ya video yaliyokamilika kurudi kwenye jibu la /v1/videos/generations linalofanana na OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.sambanova: Salio la bure la $5 unapojisajili (uhalali wa siku 30), hakuna kadi ya mkopo inayohitajika
onboardingProviderDescriptions.sap: Ugunduzi wa miundo hutumia /v2/lm/scenarios/foundation-models/models kwenye AI_API_URL. Maombi ya gumzo hutumia deploymentUrl/chat/completions na yanahitaji AI-Resource-Group.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.scaleway: Tokeni 1M za bure kwa akaunti mpya — inatii EU/GDPR (Paris), Qwen3 235B & Llama 70B
onboardingProviderDescriptions.sensenova: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye platform.sensenova.cn
onboardingProviderDescriptions.siliconflow: Salio la bure la $1 pamoja na miundo ya bure kabisa baada ya uthibitishaji wa kitambulisho
onboardingProviderDescriptions.snowflake: Unganisha Snowflake Cortex kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.sparkdesk: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye console.xfyun.cn
onboardingProviderDescriptions.stability-ai: Unganisha Stability AI kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.stepfun: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye platform.stepfun.com
onboardingProviderDescriptions.sumopod: SumoPod hutoa endpoint ya ukamilishaji wa gumzo inayooana na OpenAI katika https://ai.sumopod.com/v1/chat/completions, pamoja na orodha ya moja kwa moja ya /v1/models. OmniRoute hutumia itifaki ya OpenAI na huorodhesha miundo kupitia passthrough.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.suno: Bandika kuki ya kipindi kutoka suno.ai (Clerk auth)
onboardingProviderDescriptions.synthetic: Unganisha Synthetic kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.tencent: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye console.cloud.tencent.com
onboardingProviderDescriptions.thebai: Ufunguo wa API wa Bearer kwa ajili ya lango la TheB.AI linalooana na OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.together: Unganisha Together AI kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.tokenrouter: TokenRouter hutoa endpoint ya ukamilishaji wa gumzo inayooana na OpenAI katika https://api.tokenrouter.com/v1/chat/completions, pamoja na orodha inayofanya kazi ya /v1/models. OmniRoute hutumia itifaki ya OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.topaz: Unganisha Topaz kwa kutumia ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.udio: Bandika kuki ya kipindi kutoka udio.com (Supabase auth)
onboardingProviderDescriptions.uncloseai: Hakuna uthibitishaji unaohitajika. API inakubali mfuatano wowote usio mtupu kama ufunguo wa utambulisho.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.upstage: Unganisha Upstage kwa ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.v0-vercel: Unganisha v0 (Vercel) kwa ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.venice: Unganisha Venice.ai kwa ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.vercel-ai-gateway: Unganisha Vercel AI Gateway kwa ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.vertex: Toa Service Account JSON au access_token ya OAuth
onboardingProviderDescriptions.vertex-partner: Toa Service Account JSON ile ile inayotumika kwa miundo ya washirika ya Vertex AI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.volcengine: Unganisha Volcengine kwa ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.voyage-ai: Ufunguo wa API wa Bearer kwa ajili ya vipachiko na API za rerank za Voyage AI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.wandb: Unganisha Weights & Biases Inference kwa ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.x5lab: X5Lab hutoa endpoint ya ukamilishaji wa gumzo inayooana na OpenAI kwenye https://api.x5lab.dev/v1/chat/completions, pamoja na orodha ya moja kwa moja ya /v1/models. OmniRoute hutumia itifaki ya OpenAI na kuorodhesha miundo kupitia passthrough.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.xai: Unganisha xAI (Grok) kwa ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.xiaomi-mimo: Unganisha Xiaomi MiMo kwa ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.yi: Pata ufunguo wa API kwenye platform.lingyiwanwu.com
onboardingProviderDescriptions.zenmux: ZenMux hutoa endpoint ya ukamilishaji wa gumzo inayooana na OpenAI kwenye /api/v1/chat/completions, pamoja na nyuso za itifaki za Anthropic Messages (/api/anthropic/v1/messages) na Google Gemini (/api/vertex-ai). OmniRoute hutumia itifaki ya OpenAI.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.galadriel: Unganisha Galadriel kwa ufunguo wa API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.predibase: Salio la majaribio ya bure la $25 (uhalali wa siku 30)
onboardingProviderDescriptions.chenzk: Lango linalooana na OpenAI lenye orodha ya miundo ya moja kwa moja kwenye chenzk.top.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.freepik: Zalisha picha kwa kutumia Mystic API ya Freepik.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.freetheai: Lango la bure linalooana na OpenAI lenye usaidizi wa miundo ya passthrough.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.g4f-gemini: Reverse proxy ya bure isiyo na ufunguo ya g4f.space kwenda Gemini, yenye kikomo cha maombi 5 kwa dakika.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.g4f-groq: Reverse proxy ya bure isiyo na ufunguo ya g4f.space kwenda Groq, yenye kikomo cha maombi 5 kwa dakika.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.g4f-nvidia: Reverse proxy ya bure isiyo na ufunguo ya g4f.space kwenda NVIDIA NIM, yenye kikomo cha maombi 5 kwa dakika.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.g4f-ollama: Lango la bure la Ollama lililopangishwa lisilo na ufunguo kutoka g4f.space, lenye kikomo cha maombi 5 kwa dakika.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.g4f-pollinations: Reverse proxy ya bure isiyo na ufunguo ya g4f.space kwenda Pollinations, yenye kikomo cha maombi 5 kwa dakika.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.mixedbread: Unda vipachiko kwa kutumia Mixedbread API.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.segmind: Zalisha picha na video kwa kutumia miundo iliyopangishwa ya Segmind.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.amazon-q: Hutumia AWS Builder ID ile ile au mtiririko wa refresh-token ulioingizwa kama Kiro, lakini huweka miunganisho ya Amazon Q kando.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.antigravity: Unganisha Antigravity kwa mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.agy: Ingiza kuingia kwako kwa Antigravity CLI (`agy`) (bandika/pakia faili yake ya tokeni), tambua kiotomatiki kuingia kwa CLI ya ndani, au ingia kwa kutumia Google. Inashiriki mfumo wa nyuma wa Antigravity (ikijumuisha miundo ya Claude).
onboardingProviderDescriptions.claude: Unganisha Claude Code kwa mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.cline: Unganisha Cline kwa mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.cursor: Unganisha Cursor IDE kwa mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.github: Unganisha GitHub Copilot kwa mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.gitlab-duo: Programu ya OAuth yenye upeo wa ai_features + read_user. Sanidi GITLAB_DUO_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID na kwa hiari GITLAB_DUO_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET kwenye instansi hii ya OmniRoute.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.kilocode: Unganisha Kilo Code kwa mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.kimi-coding: Unganisha Kimi Coding kwa mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.kiro: Kiwango cha bure: mikopo 50/mwezi (~tokeni 25K–100K). ⚠️ Kiro ToS inakataza matumizi ya proksi/harness ya wahusika wengine.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.codex: Unganisha OpenAI Codex na mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.
onboardingProviderDescriptions.qwen: Unganisha Qwen Code na mtiririko uliopo wa OAuth.

providers.passthroughModelsDescription: {provider} inakubali vitambulisho vya asili vya mtoa huduma. Ingiza kutoka /miundo au ongeza vitambulisho maalum vya kuelekeza.
providers.bedrockModelsDescription: Mitindo ya Amazon Bedrock inatolewa na eneo la AWS. Ingiza kutoka /miundo au ongeza vitambulisho vya muundo wa Bedrock vilivyowezeshwa katika eneo lililochaguliwa.
providers.webCookieCredentialHint: Kidakuzi kinachohitajika: {credential}. Bandika thamani ya kichwa cha Kidakuzi kutoka kwa kipindi chako cha wavuti cha {provider} ulichoingia. Usijumuishe Kidakuzi: kiambishi awali.
providers.webTokenCredentialHint: Kitambulisho: {credential}. Bandika thamani ya tokeni kutoka kwa kipindi chako cha wavuti cha {provider} ulichoingia, au uhamishaji wa DevTools HAR ikiwa mtoa huduma ataitumia.
providers.webCookieEditHint: Acha wazi ili kuweka kidakuzi cha kipindi cha sasa. Kidakuzi kinachohitajika: {credential}.
providers.webTokenEditHint: Acha wazi ili kuweka tokeni ya sasa ya kipindi cha wavuti. Kitambulisho: {credential}.
providers.webSessionGuideTitle: Jinsi ya kupata kitambulisho cha kikao
providers.webSessionGuideIntro: {provider} hutumia kipindi cha wavuti cha kivinjari badala ya ufunguo wa API.
providers.webSessionGuideStep2: Fungua zana za msanidi wa kivinjari na uangalie ombi lililotolewa na programu ya wavuti.
providers.webSessionGuideStep3: Nakili kitambulisho kinachohitajika kutoka kwa kikoa cha mtoaji mwenyewe. Kwa vidakuzi, nakili tu thamani ya kichwa cha Kuki na uache Cookie:.
providers.webSessionGuideStep4: Ibandike hapa na uangalie muunganisho. Ikiacha kufanya kazi, ingia tena na uibadilishe kwa thamani mpya.
providers.webSessionSecurityHint: Lichukulie hili kama nenosiri: linaweza kufikia akaunti yako ya wavuti uliyoingia hadi itakapoisha au kubatilishwa.
providers.webNoAuthGuideBody: {provider} haihitaji ufunguo wa API au kidakuzi. Hifadhi muunganisho ili utumie mwisho wake wa wavuti bila malipo.
providers.webSessionCredentialValidationFailed: Uthibitishaji wa kitambulisho cha kipindi umeshindwa. Ingia tena, nakili kitambulisho kipya, na ujaribu tena.
providers.huggingchatDesc: Soga ya bure ya LLM kupitia huggingface.co/chat
providers.poeWebDesc: Soga ya modeli nyingi kupitia poe.com
providers.v0VercelWebDesc: Uzalishaji wa msimbo wa AI kupitia v0.dev
providers.kimiWebDesc: Soga ya watumiaji ya Moonshot AI kupitia www.kimi.com (kimataifa, Connect-RPC API)
providers.doubaoWebDesc: Soga ya AI ya ByteDance kupitia dola.com
providers.overrideBaseUrlAdvanced: Ya hali ya juu: batilisha URL ya msingi
providers.overrideBaseUrlHint: Ya hali ya juu: elekeza mtoa huduma huyu aliyejengewa ndani kwenye endpoint maalum. Acha wazi ili kutumia chaguomsingi.
providers.bulkAddFormatHintCloudflare: Ufunguo mmoja kwa kila mstari. Umbizo: name|accountId|apiKey (Kitambulisho cha akaunti ya Cloudflare + tokeni ya API).
providers.lmarenaWebCookieHint: Fungua arena.ai, ingia, kisha nakili kichwa kizima cha Cookie kutoka kwa ombi la Network. Jumuisha arena-auth-prod-v1.0 na arena-auth-prod-v1.1 (na vipande zaidi vikiwepo), ikiwezekana pamoja na cf_clearance. Usibandike tu kuki tupu ya arena-auth-prod-v1. Ya hiari: providerSpecificData.recaptchaV3Token ikiwa create-evaluation bado inarudisha 403.
providers.kimiOfficialSupporterTooltip: Kimi (Moonshot AI) ni rafiki mwanzilishi wa chanzo huria wa OmniRoute
providers.kimiPartnerLinkNote: Kiungo cha mshirika — kinaunga mkono OmniRoute bila gharama ya ziada kwako

settings.title: Settings
settings.routingSettingsIntro: Hudhibiti jinsi maombi yako yanavyoelekezwa, kubadilishwa na kutumwa kwa watoa huduma wa AI.
settings.routingOpDropParagraphContainsDesc: Huondoa aya yoyote (bloku ya maandishi iliyotenganishwa kwa mistari mitupu) ndani ya kidokezo cha mfumo ambayo maandishi yake yana YOYOTE kati ya mifuatano midogo ya herufi iliyoorodheshwa. Tumia kuondoa alama za utambulisho za klayenti za wahusika wengine kama vile 'github.com/anomalyco/opencode' au 'docs.openwebui.com' ambazo kiainishaji cha Anthropic huwekea alama.
settings.routingOpDropParagraphStartsWithDesc: Huondoa aya yoyote INAYOANZA NA mojawapo ya viambishi awali vilivyoorodheshwa. Tumia kwa mistari ya utambulisho kama vile 'You are OpenCode' au 'You are Open WebUI' inayotangaza klayenti inayofanya wito.
settings.routingOpReplaceTextDesc: Hubadilisha mfuatano mdogo halisi wa herufi na mfuatano mdogo mwingine halisi wa herufi. Tumia kwa vifungu vichochezi vinavyojulikana — k.m. andika upya 'Here is some useful information about the environment you are running in:' kuwa 'Environment context you are running in:' (kifungu kichochezi kilichothibitishwa kwa majaribio).
settings.routingOpReplaceRegexDesc: Hubadilisha maandishi yanayolingana na usemi wa kawaida (regular expression). Tumia unapohitaji ruwaza (madarasa ya herufi, nafasi wazi ya hiari, nanga) badala ya mifuatano midogo halisi ya herufi. Ruwaza yenye hitilafu hunaswa wakati wa runtime wakati op inapofanya kazi.
settings.routingOpDropBlockContainsDesc: Huondoa bloku NZIMA za mfumo (sio aya tu) ambazo maandishi yake yana mojawapo ya mifuatano midogo ya herufi iliyoorodheshwa. Tumia wakati bloku nzima ina alama za utambulisho na unataka iondolewe — k.m. maelezo yaliyoingizwa ya MCP-server.
settings.routingOpPrependSystemBlockDesc: Huingiza bloku mpya ya maandishi MWANZO mwa safu ya mfumo. Tumia kuongeza utambulisho wa SDK 'You are a Claude agent, built on Anthropic's Claude Agent SDK.' ambao kiainishaji cha Anthropic kinatarajia.
settings.routingOpAppendSystemBlockDesc: Huingiza bloku mpya ya maandishi MWISHONI mwa safu ya mfumo. Tumia kwa nyongeza za urembo ambazo hazihitaji kuwa katika nafasi ya [0].
settings.routingOpInjectBillingHeaderDesc: Hutanguliza kitalu maalum cha maandishi cha 'x-anthropic-billing-header: cc_version=...; cc_entrypoint=...; cch=...;' ambacho kiainishaji cha Anthropic hukihakiki. Kinahitajika kwa ncha za uwasilishaji za daraja la CC; kwa mtoa huduma asilia wa claude, OmniRoute tayari huingiza mstari wake wa malipo kwa hivyo op hii kawaida huwa ya ziada hapo.
settings.routingOpObfuscateWordsDesc: Huingiza herufi ya Zero-Width-Joiner baada ya herufi ya kwanza ya kila neno lililoorodheshwa, kwa hivyo 'opencode' inakuwa 'o‍pencode'. Inasomeka sawa kwa wanadamu lakini inakwepa ulinganishaji wa maneno wa kiainishaji. Inalenga vitalu vya mfumo, ujumbe wa mtumiaji/msaidizi, na maelezo ya zana.
settings.routingNeedlesHint: Orodha ya vijisehemu vya maandishi. Aya inalingana ikiwa ina YOYOTE kati yao. Ongeza moja kwa kila mstari kupitia 'Add entry'.
settings.routingPrefixesHint: Orodha ya mifuatano ya herufi. Aya inalingana ikiwa inaanza na yoyote kati yao (nafasi tupu ya mwanzo huondolewa kabla ya kulinganisha).
settings.routingCaseSensitiveHint: Wakati IMEWASHWA, 'OpenCode' na 'opencode' ni mifuatano tofauti. Wakati IMEZIMWA (chaguo-msingi), ulinganishaji hupuuza herufi kubwa au ndogo.
settings.routingMatchLiteralHint: Kijisehemu halisi cha maandishi cha kupata. Hakuna sintaksia ya regex — herufi maalum kama . * ? huchukuliwa kama zilivyo.
settings.routingReplacementTextHint: Mfuatano wa kubadilisha. Acha wazi ili kufuta ulinganisho. Toleo huhifadhi maandishi yanayozunguka.
settings.routingAllOccurrencesHint: Wakati IMEWASHWA (chaguo-msingi), kila tukio hubadilishwa. Wakati IMEZIMWA, ni ulinganisho wa kwanza tu unaobadilishwa.
settings.routingPatternHint: Chanzo cha regex cha JavaScript. Usiweke kwenye alama za mshazari — andika tu 'foo(.*)bar'. Seva hukataa mifumo inayoshindwa kukusanywa.
settings.routingRegexFlagsHint: Alama za regex za JavaScript (g = mechi zote, i = haijali herufi kubwa/ndogo, s = nukta inalingana na mstari mpya, m = mistari mingi). Chaguo-msingi 'g'.
settings.routingBlockTextHint: Maandishi kamili ya kitalu kipya cha mfumo. Tumia mfuatano halisi wa herufi; kitalu cha mfumo huhifadhi maandishi pekee.
settings.routingIdempotencyKeyHint: Hiari. Ikiwekwa, op hurukwa wakati kitalu ambacho maandishi yake yanaanza na ufunguo huu tayari kipo. Huzuia utangulizaji mara mbili wakati wa kujaribu tena.
settings.routingBillingEntrypointHint: Thamani iliyoingizwa kama 'cc_entrypoint='. Anthropic inakubali 'sdk-cli' (Agent SDK), 'cli' (Claude Code CLI), au thamani zingine zilizoandikwa kwenye nyaraka.
settings.routingBillingVersionFormatHint: Jinsi hashi ya uundaji ya herufi 3 baada ya cc_version= inavyokokotolewa. 'ex-machina' = sha256 ya CCH_SALT+herufi-kutoka-ujumbe-wa-kwanza-wa-mtumiaji+toleo (kwa kila ujumbe). 'omniroute-daystamp' = sha256 ya YYYY-MM-DD+toleo (thabiti kwa siku).
settings.routingBillingCchAlgoHint: Jinsi tokeni ya cch= ya herufi 5 inavyokokotolewa. 'sha256-first-user' = sha256 ya maandishi ya ujumbe wa kwanza wa mtumiaji. 'xxhash64-body' = utiaji saini wa kiwango cha bodi huijaza baadaye. 'static-zero' = kishikilia nafasi halisi cha '00000'.
settings.routingObfuscateWordsHint: Maneno ya herufi ndogo ya kuficha. Uingizaji wa ZWJ hutumiwa bila kujali herufi kubwa au ndogo, kwa hivyo 'opencode' pia inalingana na 'OpenCode' na 'OPENCODE'.
settings.routingObfuscateTargetsHint: Ni maeneo gani ya mwili wa ujumbe ya kukagua kwa ajili ya maneno: vitalu vya mfumo, ujumbe wa mtumiaji/msaidizi, na/au maelezo ya zana.
settings.routingSummarizeInjectBillingHeader: ingiza kichwa cha malipo (entrypoint={entrypoint}, version={versionFormat}, cch={cchAlgo})
settings.routingDefaultAutoVariantLKGP: Mtoa Huduma Mzuri wa Mwisho Anayejulikana
settings.routingDefaultAutoVariantLKGPDesc: Mtoa Huduma Mzuri wa Mwisho Anayejulikana
settings.routingOpSummaryCount: {count, plural, =0 {hakuna op} one {# op} other {# op}}
settings.resilienceSettingsIntro: Jaribu tena kiotomatiki, upunguzaji kasi na urejeshaji nyuma watoa huduma wanaposhindwa.
settings.aiSettingsIntro: Mipangilio mahususi ya AI ya bajeti ya kufikiria, tabia ya kielelezo, na mgandamizo.
settings.requestBodyLimitDescription: Maximum API payload size accepted before a request body is parsed. Dedicated upload routes keep at least their built-in 100 MB limit.
settings.requestBodyLimitLoadFailed: Failed to load request limit settings
settings.requestBodyLimitSaveFailed: Failed to save request body limit
settings.memoryEnabledDesc: When enabled, OmniRoute will inject relevant past context.
settings.memoryTokenCostWarning: Angalizo: kumbukumbu ikiwa imewezeshwa, OmniRoute huingiza hadi tokeni {tokens} za muktadha uliopatikana kwenye kila ombi la soga — hii huongeza matumizi ya tokeni na gharama. Ili kuruka uingizaji huu kwa ombi maalum, tuma kichwa cha "x-omniroute-no-memory: true"
settings.modelsDevDesc: Auto-sync pricing, capabilities & specs from models.dev

settings.resilienceStructureDesc: Ukurasa huu unasanidi tabia pekee. Hali ya kuvunja moja kwa moja inaonyeshwa kwenye ukurasa wa Afya. Jaribu tena mchanganyiko maalum na udhibiti wa nafasi ya mseto unabaki kwenye mipangilio ya mseto.

settings.proxyDocumentationFreePoolDesc: Kichupo cha Dimbwi la Bure kinakusanya wakala kutoka 1proxy, Proxifly, na IPLocate. Tumia ⊕ kujaribu na kupandisha wakala kwenye sajili yako. Ni wakala tu wanaopita jaribio la muunganisho ndio wanaoongezwa.
settings.proxyDocumentationVercelRelayDescBefore: Vercel Relay ni kiunganishi cha ukingo wa nje — si handaki la ndani. Kuisambaza hutuma simu za LLM API kupitia IP thabiti za Vercel, ikipita vizuizi vya kijiografia vya kituo cha data na vikomo vya kasi. Kiunganishi kinalindwa na kichwa cha siri kilichozalishwa

settings.denoRelayOrgDomainHint: Kikoa chaguomsingi cha shirika lako la Deno Deploy (k.m. acme.deno.net). Kiunganishi kitafikiwa kwenye https://<app-name>.<org-slug>.deno.net.

settings.thinkingBudgetDesc: Control AI reasoning token usage across all requests
settings.passthroughDesc: No changes — client controls thinking budget
settings.customDesc: Set a fixed token budget for all requests
settings.adaptiveDesc: Scale budget based on request complexity
settings.adaptiveHint: Adaptive mode scales from this base level based on message count, tool usage, and prompt length.
settings.requireLoginDesc: When ON, dashboard requires password. When OFF, access without login.
settings.requireAuthModelsDesc: When ON, the /v1/models endpoint returns 404 for unauthenticated requests. Prevents model discovery by unauthorized users.
settings.authModelClient: Sehemu za mwisho za API ya Mteja (/v1/*, /chat/*, /responses/*, /codex/*, /messages/*) zinahitaji kitufe cha Bearer API.
settings.authModelManagement: Sehemu za mwisho za usimamizi (/dashibodi, /api/*) zinahitaji kipindi cha dashibodi au kitambulisho cha usimamizi.
settings.authModelPublic: Njia za kuingia, afya, na bootstrap pekee ndizo za umma.
settings.bruteForceProtectionDesc: Kosa na kufunga /api/auth/login baada ya kushindwa mara kwa mara kutoka kwa IP sawa.
settings.corsAllowedOriginsDesc: Orodha iliyotenganishwa na koma ya asili ya kivinjari inayoruhusiwa kupiga seva hii. Orodha tupu = hakuna ufikiaji wa CORS wa kivinjari (server-to-server bado inafanya kazi). Tumia CORS_ALLOW_ALL=true env var kwa maendeleo pekee.
settings.blockedProvidersDesc: Hide specific providers from the /v1/models response. Blocked providers will not appear in model listings.
settings.cliFingerprintDesc: Match native CLI binary signatures when proxying requests. Reorders headers and body fields to look identical to the official CLI tools. Your proxy IP is preserved.
settings.systemTransforms: Bomba la Kubadilisha Kizuizi cha Mfumo
settings.systemTransformsDesc: Kwa kila mtoa huduma aliagiza bomba la mabadiliko yanayotumika kwa shirika la ombi kabla ya kusambaza. Inaauni kitambulisho chochote cha mtoa huduma.
settings.systemTransformsNoProviders: Hakuna watoa huduma waliosanidiwa. Ongeza mtoa huduma ili kuanza.
settings.routingAdvancedGuideHint1: Use Fill First for predictable priority, Round Robin for fairness, and P2C for latency resilience.
settings.routingAdvancedGuideHint2: If providers vary in quality/cost, start with Cost Opt for background work and Least Used for balanced wear.
settings.p2cDesc: Pick 2 random, use the healthier one
settings.resetAwareDesc: Pendelea akaunti zilizo na kiasi kilichosalia cha afya na uwekaji upya wa karibu zaidi
settings.strictRandomDesc: Shuffle deck — uses each account once before reshuffling
settings.routingStrategySubtitle: Linganisha 9router: round-robin ya akaunti, vikomo vya kunata, na mzunguko wa combo
settings.accountRoundRobinDesc: Mzunguko kupitia akaunti ili kusambaza mzigo
settings.comboRoundRobinDesc: Mzunguko kupitia shabaha za combo badala ya kuanza na ya kwanza kila wakati
settings.comboStickyLimitDesc: Maombi kwa kila shabaha ya combo kabla ya kubadilisha
settings.routingStrategyAccountSummary: Kusambaza maombi kwenye akaunti zote kukiwa na maombi {limit} kwa kila akaunti.
settings.routingStrategyFillFirstSummary: Kutumia akaunti kwa mpangilio wa kipaumbele (Jaza Kwanza).
settings.routingStrategyComboSummary: Combo huzunguka baada ya maombi {limit} kwa kila shabaha.
settings.routingStrategyComboFallbackSummary: Combo hutumia mkakati uliosanidiwa wa kila combo (kipaumbele cha msingi/mbadala).
settings.providerAccountRoutingDesc: Batilisha mkakati wa kimataifa wa akaunti kwa mtoa huduma huyu (usawa wa 9router).
settings.modelAliasesDesc: Remap model names using exact matches or wildcard patterns.
settings.backgroundDegradationDesc: Auto-detect background tasks (titles, summaries) and route to cheaper models
settings.enableDegradationHint: When enabled, background tasks like title generation and summarization are routed to cheaper models automatically
settings.clearLocalDataConfirm: Clear all local data? This will reset your preferences.
settings.ipAccessControlDesc: Block or allow specific IP addresses
settings.fallbackChainsDesc: Define provider fallback order per model
settings.noFallbackChainsDesc: Create a chain to define provider fallback order for a model.
settings.fillModelAndProviders: Please fill model name and providers
settings.comboDefaultsGuideHint1: Keep retries low in low-latency flows; increase timeout only for long generation tasks.
settings.comboDefaultsGuideHint2: Use provider overrides when one provider needs different timeout/retry behavior than global defaults.
settings.defaultStrategyDesc: Applied to new combos without explicit strategy
settings.contextRelayDesc: Priority-style routing with automatic context handoffs when account rotation happens
settings.providerOverridesDesc: Override timeout and retries per provider. Provider settings override global defaults.
settings.contextRelayProviderNote: Context Relay currently generates handoffs for Codex accounts and uses these values as global defaults for new or unconfigured combos.
settings.providerProfilesDesc: Separate resilience settings for OAuth (session-based) and API Key (metered) providers. OAuth providers have stricter thresholds due to lower rate limits.
settings.rateLimitingDesc: API Key providers are automatically rate-limited with safe defaults. Limits are learned from response headers and adapt over time.
settings.noCircuitBreakers: No circuit breakers active yet. They are created automatically when requests flow through the combo pipeline.
settings.allOperational: All systems operational — no lockouts or tripped breakers
settings.allDataLocal: All data stored locally on your machine
settings.confirmDbImportDesc: This will replace all current data with the content from {file}. A backup will be created automatically before the import.
settings.backupRetentionDesc: Database snapshots are created automatically before restore and every 15 minutes when data changes. Retention: 24 hourly + 30 daily backups with smart rotation.
settings.noBackupsYet: No backups available yet. Backups will be created automatically when data changes.
settings.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Only .sqlite files are accepted.
settings.restoreSuccess: Restored! {connections} connections, {nodes} nodes, {combos} combos, {apiKeys} API keys.
settings.importSuccess: Database imported! {connections} connections, {nodes} nodes, {combos} combos, {apiKeys} API keys.
settings.modelPricingDesc: Configure cost rates per model • All rates in $/1M tokens
settings.modelOverridesDesc: Batilisha uwezo wa mtoa huduma/modeli unaotumiwa na uelekezaji na uundaji wa ombi. Malengo yanatumia mfumo sawa wa mtoa huduma/modeli kama michanganyiko.
settings.noModelOverrides: Hakuna ubatilishaji uliosanidiwa kwa modeli hii.
settings.resetPricingConfirm: Reset all pricing for {provider} to defaults?
settings.pricingDescInput: Input: tokens sent to the model
settings.pricingDescCached: Cached: reused input (~50% of input rate)
settings.pricingDescReasoning: Reasoning: thinking tokens (falls back to Output)
settings.pricingDescCacheWrite: Cache Write: creating cache entries (falls back to Input)
settings.pricingDescFormula: Cost = (input × input_rate) + (output × output_rate) + (cached × cached_rate) per million tokens.
settings.costCalculationDesc: Costs are calculated based on token usage and pricing rates configured for each model.
settings.pricingFormatDesc: All rates are in $/1M tokens (dollars per million tokens).
settings.cachedTokenDesc: Cached input tokens (typically 50% of input rate)
settings.reasoningTokenDesc: Special reasoning/thinking tokens (fallback to output rate)
settings.cacheCreationTokenDesc: Tokens used to create cache entries (fallback to input rate)
settings.customPricingNote: You can override default pricing for specific models. Custom overrides take priority over auto-detected pricing.
settings.adaptiveVolumeRoutingDesc: Scale connections dynamically based on payload volume and throughput pressure.
settings.lkgpToggleDesc: When enabled, the router remembers which provider last served a successful response and tries it first on subsequent requests.
settings.echoRequestedModelTitle: Rudisha jina la modeli lililoombwa kwenye majibu
settings.echoRequestedModelDesc: Inapowezeshwa, uga wa `model` wa jibu unarudisha jina la lakabu au combo ambalo mteja aliomba badala ya jina la modeli ya juu (upstream). Hurekebisha wateja wakali (k.m. Claude Desktop) wanaokataa jibu ambalo modeli yake hailingani na ombi.
settings.webSearchRouteDesc: Wakati ombi linajumuisha zana asili ya web_search, elekeza ombi zima kwenye modeli hii badala ya ile chaguomsingi — ni muhimu kwa watoa huduma ambao hawatekelezi zana ya seva ya web_search ya Anthropic. Acha wazi ili kulemaza.
settings.paidModelPatternWarning: Mchoro huu unalingana tu na modeli zinazolipiwa — wezesha modeli zinazolipiwa au urekebishe mchoro.
settings.logsDeleted: {count, plural, =0 {Hakuna kumbukumbu zilizoisha muda zilizofutwa} one {Imefuta kumbukumbu # iliyoisha muda} other {Zimefutwa kumbukumbu # zilizoisha muda}}
settings.resetUsageDataDesc: Chagua ni muda gani uliopita unataka kufuta matumizi, kumbukumbu za maombi, na data ya uchanganuzi. Usanidi wa mtoa huduma, miunganisho, funguo za API, combos, na mipangilio vinahifadhiwa. Hatua hii haiwezi kubatilishwa.
settings.resetUsageSuccess: {count, plural, =0 {Hakuna safu mlalo za data ya matumizi zilizofutwa} one {Weka upya data ya matumizi (safu mlalo # imefutwa)} other {Weka upya data ya matumizi (safu mlalo # zimefutwa)}}

settings.routingClientCacheControlAlwaysDesc: Tuma kila wakati vijajuu vya cache_control vilivyotolewa na mteja kwa watoa huduma wa juu jinsi vilivyo.
