settings.resilienceMaximumWaitPerRetry: Upeo wa kusubiri kwa kila jaribio tena
settings.cliproxyapiImportAuthDesc: Leta akaunti za OAuth ambazo CLIProxyAPI tayari imehifadhi katika ~/.cli-proxy-api/ kama miunganisho ya OmniRoute, ili usihitaji kuingia tena katika kila akaunti. Aina za akaunti zinazotumika (Gemini, Codex, Claude, Antigravity, Qwen, Kimi) zinaletwa; nyingine zinarukwa.
settings.payloadRulesDesc: Sanidi mabadiliko ya mzigo wa ombi kulingana na modeli na itifaki. Mabadiliko yanahifadhiwa katika mipangilio na kupakiwa upya mara moja kwenye mazingira ya utekelezaji baada ya kuhifadhi.
settings.payloadRuleDefaultDesc: Hutumia vigezo pale tu njia lengwa inapokosekana kwenye mzigo unaotoka.
settings.payloadRuleOverrideDesc: Hulazimisha thamani kwenye mzigo, ikibadilisha chochote kilichopo tayari kwenye njia hiyo.
settings.payloadRuleFilterDesc: Huondoa params zilizozuiwa kutoka kwenye payload kabla ya ombi la upstream kutumwa.
settings.payloadRuleDefaultRawDesc: Kama default, lakini thamani za string huchanganuliwa kama JSON kwanza inapowezekana. Lakabu ya ingizo ya urithi default-raw pia inakubaliwa wakati wa kuhifadhi.
settings.payloadEditorDesc: Tumia muundo wa schema ya runtime: default, override, filter, defaultRaw. API pia inakubali ufunguo wa ingizo wa urithi default-raw.
settings.payloadResetInfo: Kihariri kimerejeshwa kwenye kiolezo cha neutral. Hifadhi ili kukitumia.
settings.payloadSaveSuccess: Sheria za payload zimehifadhiwa na kupakiwa upya papo hapo.
settings.payloadMustBeObject: Sheria za payload lazima ziwe JSON object.
settings.payloadValidJsonRequired: Sheria za payload lazima ziwe JSON halali kabla ya kuhifadhi.
settings.requestLimitsDesc: Sanidi vikomo vya jumla vya maombi na ulinzi wa concurrency.
settings.maxRequestSizeDesc: Ukubwa wa juu unaoruhusiwa kwa maombi ya API yanayoingia.
settings.maxResponseSizeDesc: Ukubwa wa juu unaoruhusiwa kwa majibu ya API yanayotoka.
settings.maxRequestTokensDesc: Jumla ya juu ya tokeni zinazoruhusiwa katika ombi moja.
settings.maxResponseTokensDesc: Jumla ya juu ya tokeni zinazoruhusiwa katika jibu moja.
settings.modelCooldownsEmpty: Hakuna miundo katika hali baridi kwa sasa.
settings.modelCooldownsDescription: Miundo imetengwa kwa muda baada ya hitilafu. Cooldown inapoisha inarudi kiotomatiki.
settings.modelCooldownsAllReactivated: Miundo yote iliyo kwenye cooldown imewashwa tena.
settings.responsesStateHint: Otomatiki huondoa previous_response_id isipokuwa muunganisho uwezeshe wazi hifadhi ya OpenAI Responses. Ondoa ni salama zaidi kwa wateja wasio na hali kama vile VS Code Custom Endpoint; muktadha basi hutegemea mteja kutuma historia kamili.
settings.responsesStateSaveError: Imeshindwa kusasisha mpangilio wa hali ya Responses
settings.codexFastTierDesc: Kimataifa inject service_tier=priority kwa ajili ya maombi ya OpenAI Codex.
settings.codexFastTierHint: Ikiwezeshwa, OmniRoute inaongeza service_tier=priority kwa maombi ya nje ya Codex kwa miunganisho ambayo tayari haijabainisha kiwango. Kiwango cha kipaumbele kinahitaji ufunguo wa OpenAI Enterprise API au njia ya ChatGPT-auth Codex; aina zingine muhimu zitapokea hitilafu inayohusiana na tier kutoka OpenAI. Mipangilio ya kila muunganisho kwenye ukurasa wa mtoaji wa Codex huchukua nafasi ya kwanza.
settings.codexFastTierSaveError: Imeshindwa kusasisha mpangilio wa Codex Fast Tier
settings.codexAutoPingDesc: Opt-in per connection: sends a tiny request right after a Codex session window resets so it isn't cold when you need it.
settings.codexAutoPingWarning: Consumes a small amount of real Codex quota on every ping. Off by default — enable only for connections you actively rely on.
settings.codexAutoPingSaveError: Failed to update Codex Auto-Ping setting
settings.codexFastTierModelsHint: Ni modeli zilizoteuliwa pekee zinazopokea service_tier wakati Fast Tier imewashwa.
settings.claudeFastModeDesc: Chagua maombi ya Claude yaliyochaguliwa katika Hali ya Haraka ya Anthropic (kasi:"haraka").
settings.claudeFastModeHint: Anthropic haiauni Rasmi Hali ya Haraka kwa wateja wa mtindo wa SDK. Inapowashwa, OmniRoute husonga mbele kichwa cha X-CPA-Force-Fast-Mode ili muundo wa CLIProxyAPI uliooanishwa uweze kuchagua kuingia kuharibu kiingilio. Miundo ya Opus iliyoorodheshwa pekee ndiyo inayowekwa na hundi ya upande wa mteja wa Anthropic. Kiwango cha usajili, Mpango wa Juu na salio la mkopo la Hali ya Haraka bado zinatekelezwa kwa upande wa seva - Anthropic inaweza kurudisha nje_ya_mikopo hata kigeuzi kikiwa kimewashwa.
settings.claudeFastModeSaveError: Imeshindwa kusasisha mpangilio wa Modi ya Haraka ya Claude

wildcard.title: CORS iko wazi kwa kila asili (CORS_ALLOW_ALL=true)
wildcard.desc: Tovuti yoyote inaweza kuita API ya seva hii kutoka kwenye kivinjari cha mgeni. Tumia kwenye mitandao inayoaminika pekee — weka asili mahususi katika ALLOWED_ORIGINS na uzime CORS_ALLOW_ALL katika uzalishaji.

authz.title: Orodha ya Uidhinishaji
authz.description: Uainishaji wa njia wa madaraja 5 wenye sera ya ukwepaji ya moja kwa moja. Kusoma kunaonyesha taksonomia kamili; mabadiliko yanaomba tena nenosiri la usimamizi.

kill_switch.label: Swichi ya kuzima ukwepaji
kill_switch.desc: Kiteuzi kikuu. Kikiwa kimezimwa, hakuna kiambishi awali cha LOCAL_ONLY kinachoweza kufikiwa kutoka nje ya loopback bila kujali orodha ya kila kiambishi awali.

prefix.label: Viambishi awali vinavyoweza kukwepwa
prefix.desc: Viambishi awali vya LOCAL_ONLY ambavyo funguo za API za upeo wa usimamizi (au vipindi vya dashibodi) vinaweza kufikia kutoka kwa seva pangishi zisizo za loopback.
prefix.empty: Hakuna viambishi awali vilivyosanidiwa. Ukwepaji umezimwa kimsingi.

bypass.cli_tools_runtime_note: Kiambishi awali chenye uwezo wa kuzalisha. Kimekataliwa wakati wa kutunga; hakiwezi kufanywa kuwa chenye kukwepwa. Inaonyeshwa kwa kusoma tu.

prompt.label: Nenosiri la sasa
prompt.desc: Thibitisha tena ili kutumia mabadiliko yanayoathiri usalama.

badge.bypassable: Inaweza kukwepwa kupitia upeo wa usimamizi

error.PASSWORD_REQUIRED: Nenosiri la sasa linahitajika ili kutumia mabadiliko haya.
error.INSUFFICIENT_SCOPE: Ufunguo wa API hauna upeo wa manage.
error.BYPASS_PREFIX_NOT_ALLOWED: Kiambishi awali kimoja au zaidi kinalenga njia zenye uwezo wa ku-spawn na haziwezi kupitwa.

settings.resilienceRequestQueueTrigger: Kabla ya kutuma kwa mkondo wa juu
settings.resilienceRequestQueueEffect: Huweka maombi kwenye foleni, huzuia upatanifu, na huweka nafasi nje ya simu
settings.resilienceRequestQueueDesc: Safu hii inadhibiti tu kupanga foleni na mwendo. Haihifadhi baridi au vivunja mzunguko wazi.
settings.resilienceAutoEnableApiKeyProvidersDesc: Huwasha ulinzi wa foleni kwa chaguo-msingi kwa miunganisho ya vitufe vya API inayotumika.
settings.resilienceMaxQueueWait: Muda wa juu zaidi wa kusubiri kwenye foleni
settings.resilienceConnectionCooldownTrigger: Muunganisho unaporudisha hitilafu ya muda ya juu ya mkondo
settings.resilienceConnectionCooldownEffect: Huruka muunganisho huo kwa muda na huongeza urejesho kwa kushindwa mara kwa mara
settings.resilienceConnectionCooldownDesc: Upungufu wa msingi unashughulikia hitilafu za muda mfupi za muunganisho. Vidokezo vya kujaribu tena mkondo wa juu vinapowezeshwa, dirisha la wazi la mtoa huduma hubatilisha upunguzaji wa ndani.
settings.resilienceUseUpstreamRetryHintsDesc: Hutumia kujaribu-baada/kuweka upya thamani kutoka kwa mtoa huduma wa juu inapopatikana.
settings.resilienceUseUpstream429BreakerHints: Tumia vidokezo 429 vya juu kwa upunguzaji wa kikatiaji
settings.resilienceUseUpstream429BreakerHintsDesc: Tekeleza mawimbi ya Jaribu tena Baada ya / kiasi-kuisha kutoka kwa majibu 429 hadi muda wa kupoeza kwa kivunja mzunguko. Chaguomsingi hutumia sera ya kila mtoaji: watoa huduma za wingu moja kwa moja huwashwa; wakala wa nyuma, mwenyeji mwenyewe, na watoa huduma wanaoungwa mkono na CLI wamezimwa chaguomsingi. Haitegemei "Tumia vidokezo vya kujaribu tena juu ya mkondo".
settings.resilienceProviderBreakerTrigger: Hitilafu za mwisho za usafiri/seva baada ya urejeshaji wa muunganisho kuisha
settings.resilienceProviderBreakerEffect: Humzuia mtoa huduma huyo kwa muda hadi muda wa kuweka upya uishe
settings.resilienceProviderBreakerDesc: Hali ya kuvunja moja kwa moja inaonekana kwenye ukurasa wa Afya pekee. Viwango vya viwango vya 429 vilivyopitiwa na muunganisho hukaa katika Upunguzaji wa Muunganisho na usikwaruze kikatiza huduma.
settings.resilienceWaitForCooldownTrigger: Wakati miunganisho yote ya wagombea tayari inapoa
settings.resilienceWaitForCooldownEffect: Inasubiri kwenye seva na kujaribu tena wakati baridi ya kwanza inaisha
settings.resilienceWaitForCooldownDesc: Hii inaathiri tu ombi la sasa. Haihifadhi muunganisho au hali ya mtoa huduma.
settings.resilienceEnableServerWait: Washa kusubiri kwa upande wa seva
settings.resilienceEnableServerWaitDesc: Inapowashwa, OmniRoute husubiri upoeshaji wa kwanza kuisha na itajaribu tena kiotomatiki.
settings.resilienceMaxWaitPerAttempt: Upeo wa kusubiri kwa kila jaribio
settings.resilienceComboCooldownWaitTitle: Muda wa kusubiri cooldown ya combo ya quota-share
settings.resilienceComboCooldownWaitDesc: Kwa combo za quota-share pekee: subiri cooldown fupi ya muda mfupi na utume tena badala ya kurudisha 429 mara moja. Haisubiri kamwe kwenye quota_exhausted.
settings.resilienceComboCooldownWaitToggleDesc: Combo za quota-share pekee; haisubiri kamwe kwenye quota_exhausted.
settings.resilienceComboCooldownMaxWaitMs: Muda wa juu zaidi wa kusubiri kwa kila jaribio
settings.resilienceQuotaShareConcurrencyTitle: Utekelezaji sambamba kwa kila muunganisho wa quota-share
settings.resilienceQuotaShareConcurrencyDesc: Kwa combo za quota-share pekee: muunganisho unapoweka kikomo cha Max Concurrent, panga maombi yanayofanyika kwa wakati mmoja kwa akaunti hiyo ya usajili ili isizidiwe kamwe kupita kiwango chake cha juu. Maombi ya ziada yanasubiri kwenye foleni badala ya kupata 429. Kikomo kinatoka kwenye sehemu ya Max Concurrent ya kila muunganisho; swichi hii inawezesha au kulemaza tu kuheshimu kikomo hicho.
settings.resilienceQuotaShareConcurrencyToggleDes: Combo za quota-share pekee; inaheshimu kikomo cha Max Concurrent cha kila muunganisho.
settings.resilienceProviderCooldownEffect: Humpita mtoa huduma aliyeshindwa kwa kipindi cha cooldown kabla ya kujaribu tena
settings.resilienceProviderCooldownDesc: Huzuia maombi yanayofuata kupitia tena watoa huduma wale wale wanaoshindwa. Cooldown huongezeka kwa kipeo kulingana na kushindwa mfululizo.
settings.resilienceProviderCooldownEnabled: Washa cooldown ya jumla ya mtoa huduma
settings.resilienceProviderCooldownEnabledDesc: Ikiwashwa, watoa huduma walioshindwa hufuatiliwa kwa jumla na kupitwa kwa kipindi cha cooldown.
settings.forcedFingerprintTitle: Always enabled for {provider} — required for OAuth account safety; cannot be turned off.
settings.sessionAffinityDesc: Huweka mazungumzo moja kwenye akaunti ile ile kwa idadi hii ya sekunde, kwa mtoa huduma yeyote. 0 huizima.
settings.resetAwareQuotaCacheTitle: Weka upya akiba ya mgao wa kufahamu
settings.resetAwareQuotaCacheDesc: Huweka akiba ya telemetry ya upendeleo kwa uagizaji wa kufahamu upya pekee. Nafasi ya ndege ya awali bado inalinda maombi. 0/0 huendelea kuleta moja kwa moja.
settings.vercelRelayWarning: Onyo: Tokeni ya usambazaji ya Vercel inahitajika. Tokeni hii itatumika tu kuunda relay isiyo na seva na haitahifadhiwa kamwe na OmniRoute.
settings.vercelRelayFreeTierNote: Relay ni vituo vyepesi vya proksi vilivyosambazwa kwenye kiwango cha bure cha Vercel ili kukwepa vikwazo vya mtandao/eneo la ndani.
settings.denoRelayWarning: Onyo: Tokeni ya shirika ya Deno Deploy inahitajika. Tokeni hii itatumika tu kuunda programu ya relay na haitahifadhiwa kamwe na OmniRoute.
settings.denoRelayTokenLabel: Tokeni ya Shirika ya Deno Deploy
settings.denoRelayFreeTierNote: Deno Deploy v2 inafanya kazi kwenye mtandao wa kimataifa wa edge. Kiwango cha bure: maombi 1M na trafiki inayotoka ya 100GiB kwa mwezi, hakuna vikomo vya CPU kwa kila ombi, hadi programu 20 zinazotumika na vikoa maalum 50.
settings.cloudflareRelayWarning: Inasambaza Cloudflare Worker inayopitisha maombi ya LLM kupitia mtandao wa edge wa Cloudflare — ikificha IP ya seva pangishi nyuma ya anwani zinazobadilika za Cloudflare. Worker inalazimisha siri ya uthibitishaji ya mara moja ili URL ya umma ya workers.dev isiweze kutumiwa tena kama relay iliyo wazi.
settings.cloudflareRelayTokenHowto: Unda tokeni ya API chini ya My Profile -> API Tokens -> Create Token -> Custom Token -> Account / Workers Scripts / Edit.
settings.cloudflareRelayAccountIdHint: Inapatikana upande wa kulia wa ukurasa wa muhtasari wa dashibodi ya Cloudflare.
settings.cloudflareRelayApiTokenHint: Inahitaji ruhusa ya 'Workers Scripts: Edit'. Tokeni inatumika tu wakati wa kusambaza na haihifadhiwi kamwe.
settings.cloudflareRelayFreeTierNote: Kiwango cha bure: maombi 100,000/siku kwa kila akaunti ya Cloudflare.
settings.cloudflareRelayCredsRequired: Kitambulisho cha Akaunti na Tokeni ya API vinahitajika
settings.modelLockoutPageDescription: Sanidi misimbo ya hitilafu ya HTTP inayoanzisha kufungia kwa kila muundo na udhibiti tabia ya muda wa kupumzika.
settings.modelLockoutLoadFailed: Imeshindwa kupakia mipangilio ya kufungia muundo
settings.modelLockoutSaveFailed: Imeshindwa kuhifadhi mipangilio ya kufungia muundo
settings.modelLockoutBaseRangeError: Muda wa Msingi wa Kupumzika lazima uwe kati ya 5,000ms na 600,000ms
settings.modelLockoutMaxRangeError: Muda wa Juu wa Kupumzika lazima uwe kati ya 5,000ms na 3,600,000ms
settings.modelLockoutOrderError: Muda wa Juu wa Kupumzika lazima uwe mkubwa kuliko au sawa na Muda wa Msingi wa Kupumzika
settings.modelLockoutStepsRangeError: Hatua za Juu za Backoff lazima ziwe kati ya 0 na 20
settings.modelLockoutEnabledDescription: Ikiwashwa, miundo inayoshindwa ikiwa na misimbo ya hitilafu iliyosanidiwa hufungwa kwa muda ili kuzuia mizunguko ya kujaribu tena.
settings.modelLockoutErrorCodesDescription: Misimbo ya hali ya HTTP inayoanzisha kufungia muundo. Andika msimbo na ubofye Ongeza, au chagua kutoka kwa mapendekezo.
settings.modelLockoutBaseCooldownDescription: Muda wa awali wa kupumzika katika milisekunde kabla ya muundo kujaribiwa tena.
settings.modelLockoutMaxCooldownDescription: Muda wa juu zaidi wa cooldown katika milisekunde. Huzuia kufungiwa nje kwa muda mrefu kupita kiasi.
settings.modelLockoutExponentialBackoffDescriptio: Inapowashwa, kila hitilafu inayofuatana huongeza muda wa cooldown kwa kipeo.
settings.modelLockoutMaxBackoffSteps: Hatua za Juu Zaidi za Backoff
settings.modelLockoutMaxBackoffStepsDescription: Idadi ya juu zaidi ya hatua za backoff kabla ya cooldown kuacha kuongezeka. Kikomo cha Max Cooldown hufikiwa kwanza katika usanidi mwingi, na kufanya hii kuwa ukomo wa usalama wakati Max Cooldown inapoongezwa.
settings.disableSessionStickinessDesc: Mchanganyiko wa round-robin na bila mpangilio huzunguka hadi kwenye muunganisho tofauti kwa kila ombi badala ya kubandika mazungumzo yote kwenye muunganisho mmoja kwa heshi ya ujumbe wa kwanza. Acha ikiwa imezimwa ili kuhifadhi matokeo ya prompt-cache kwa mazungumzo ya zamu nyingi. Ubatilishaji wa kila mchanganyiko una kipaumbele.
settings.credentialRedactionDesc: Ficha funguo za API, tokeni, na siri kutoka kwa muktadha uliotumwa kwa watoa huduma na kutoka kwa majibu.
settings.enableCredentialRedactionDesc: Husafisha funguo za API, tokeni, funguo za faragha, na JWT kutoka kwa ujumbe, miito ya zana, na majibu.
settings.cacheOptDesc: Keeps the same reusable prompt prefix on the same provider account
settings.promptCacheAffinityDesc: Prefer the same provider account for matching prompt-cache keys while preserving health and quota failover.
settings.compressionModeCodexResponsesDesc: Conservative compression for eligible shell, patch, search, build, and JSON outputs

contextRtk.filterCatalogDesc: Vichujio vya pato vinavyopatikana kulingana na kategoria
contextRtk.guidedConfigDesc: Rekebisha jinsi RTK inavyochuja pato lako la mwisho
contextRtk.pasteOutput: Paste tool output to test filtering...
contextRtk.previewEmpty: Run a sample to preview RTK output.
contextRtk.masterSwitchOffAlert: Swichi kuu ya Token Saver IMEZIMWA — mipangilio hii haitaathiri maombi hadi uiwashe kutoka kwenye ukurasa wa Endpoint.
contextRtk.tooltipDedup: Jinsi ya kuondoa mistari iliyorudiwa kwa ukali.
contextRtk.tooltipMaxChars: Upeo wa herufi kwa kila pato.
contextRtk.tooltipMaxLines: Upeo wa mistari ya kuweka kutoka kwa pato la amri. Ziada hupunguzwa.
contextRtk.learnDiscoverDesc: Chimba matokeo ya amri uliyonasa (uhifadhi wa Raw Output lazima uwe umewashwa) ili kupendekeza vichujio vipya vya RTK. Mapendekezo pekee — unayakagua na kuyahifadhi.
contextRtk.discoverEmpty: Hakuna kelele zinazorudiwa zilizopatikana. Washa uhifadhi wa Raw Output na utekeleze amri chache kwanza.
contextRtk.learnEmpty: Bado hakuna pendekezo. Andika amri uliyotekeleza na uchanganue.
contextRtk.suggestionError: Haikuweza kupakia mapendekezo. Angalia auth ya usimamizi na ujaribu tena.
contextRtk.tomlImportDesc: Thibitisha vichujio vya schema v1 ya RTK TOML na uvisakinishe kimataifa. Usakinishaji huandika DATA_DIR/rtk/filters.toml; faili zilizopo hubadilishwa tu baada ya uthibitisho wa wazi.
contextRtk.tomlImportPlaceholder: Bandika maudhui ya filters.toml ya RTK hapa...
contextRtk.tomlConfirmOverwrite: Badilisha faili ya kimataifa iliyopo na uunde nakala rudufu
contextRtk.tomlValidationFailed: Uthibitishaji umekamilika kukiwa na majaribio ya ndani yaliyofeli
contextRtk.tomlBackupCreated: Nakala rudufu ya faili iliyotangulia iliundwa.
contextRtk.tomlImportError: Imeshindwa kuchakata faili la RTK TOML.
contextRtk.tomlFileReadError: Imeshindwa kusoma faili la TOML lililochaguliwa.

contextCombos.hubDescription: Chagua wasifu gani wa mbano utakaofanya kazi kimataifa.
contextCombos.explanationIntro: Mbano hupunguza tokeni na gharama kwa kuandika upya historia kabla haijatumwa kwa mtoa huduma huku ukihifadhi maana.
contextCombos.explanationActiveProfile: Wasifu unaotumika: huchagua wasifu gani wa mbano utakaofanya kazi kimataifa — Chaguomsingi inayotokana na paneli au mojawapo ya michanganyiko yako ya majina iliyohifadhiwa.
contextCombos.explanationDefault: Chaguomsingi (kutoka kwenye paneli): inatokana na swichi kuu na swichi za kila injini unazounda kwenye Mipangilio ya Mbano.
contextCombos.explanationNamedCombos: Michanganyiko yenye majina: mifereji ya data iliyohifadhiwa unayounda kwenye kihariri cha michanganyiko yenye majina. Kuchagua moja kunaifanya kuwa wasifu unaotumika kwa kila ombi.
contextCombos.explanationPreview: Hakiki: inaonyesha ni injini gani wasifu unaotumika unaziendesha, kwa mpangilio.
contextCombos.activeProfileDescription: Chagua wasifu gani wa mbano utakaofanya kazi kimataifa — Chaguomsingi inayotokana na paneli au mchanganyiko wa jina uliohifadhiwa.
contextCombos.contextEditingDescription: Huruhusu mtoa huduma kufuta vizuizi vya zamani vya matumizi ya zana upande wa seva, bila kuandika upya ujumbe.
contextCombos.contextEditingNote: Kwa sasa inapatikana kwa Claude (Anthropic) pekee. Ni hali iliyokabidhiwa: mtoa huduma hufuta vizuizi vya zamani vya matumizi ya zana upande wa seva — hatuandiki upya ujumbe. Haiathiri watoa huduma wengine.
contextCombos.namedCombosDescription: Hifadhi mifereji tofauti ya data na uikabidhi kwa michanganyiko maalum ya uelekezaji.
contextCombos.nameRequired: Weka jina la mchanganyiko kabla ya kuhifadhi.
contextCombos.pipelineRequired: Ongeza angalau hatua moja ya mfereji wa data kabla ya kuhifadhi.

omniglyph.description: Mfinyazo wa muktadha-kama-picha. Inatoa kidokezo cha mfumo, nyaraka za zana, na historia mnene kama kurasa fupi za PNG ambazo Claude Fable 5 husoma badala ya maandishi. Tokeni za picha hutozwa kwa vipimo badala ya herufi, kwa hivyo kizuizi kilichobadilishwa kinagharimu takriban mara 10 chini. Njia ya moja kwa moja ya Anthropic pekee.

economics.imageTokens: tokeni za picha kwa ukurasa wa 1568×728 (takriban herufi 28k)

omniglyph.realRender: Utoaji halisi wa herufi {characters, number} za nyaraka mnene za zana — si picha ya mfano.
omniglyph.gatesDescription: Fail-closed: kila lango lazima lipite, au ombi linapita bila kuguswa (kila kuruka hurekodiwa kama skip:<reason>).

model.label: Modeli
model.why: Ni Fable 5 pekee inayosoma kurasa mnene kwa usahihi wa 100% (iliyopimwa, n=30). GPT-5.5 na Gemini 2.5 Flash zimezuiwa.

transport.label: Usafirishaji
transport.why: Wakusanyaji huchukua sampuli tena za picha na kuharibu usomaji — ni njia ya moja kwa moja pekee iliyo ya kuaminika.

format.label: Umbizo
format.why: Mwili lazima utumie umbizo la Claude na haupaswi kamwe kuweka jukumu la mfumo ndani ya ujumbe.

profitable.label: Yenye faida
profitable.why: Lango halisi la gharama la kiraka cha 28px huamua kwa kila ombi; maandishi madogo au yaliyotawanyika hupita bila kuguswa.

omniglyph.enableDescription: Hufanya kazi mwisho kwenye mrundikano (baada ya RTK/Caveman kusafisha maandishi, OmniGlyph hubadilisha yaliyosalia kuwa picha) na pia hufanya kazi pekee kupitia hali ya omniglyph. Hii ni hakiki na inabaki imezimwa kwa chaguomsingi hadi uthibitishaji wa mwisho hadi mwisho ukamilike.

embeddedServices.title: Huduma Zilizopachikwa

translator.title: Translator
translator.metaDescription: Debug, test, and visualize API format translations between providers
translator.modeDescriptionPlayground: Paste any API request body and see how OmniRoute translates it between provider formats (OpenAI ↔ Claude ↔ Gemini ↔ Responses API)
translator.modeDescriptionChatTester: Send real chat requests through OmniRoute and inspect the full round-trip: input, translated request, provider response, and translated output.
translator.modeDescriptionTestBench: Run predefined scenarios and compare compatibility across providers and models.
translator.modeDescriptionLiveMonitor: Watch translation events in real time as requests flow through OmniRoute.
translator.modeDescriptionFallback: Debug, test, and visualize how OmniRoute translates API requests between providers.
translator.eventsAppearHint: Translation events appear here as requests flow through OmniRoute. Use any of these methods to generate events:
translator.inMemoryNote: Note: Events are stored in-memory and reset when the server restarts.
translator.formatConverterDescription: Paste or type a JSON request body. The translator will auto-detect the source format and convert it to the target format. Use this to debug how OmniRoute translates requests between formats (OpenAI ↔ Claude ↔ Gemini ↔ Responses API).
translator.autoFeaturesTitle: Nini OmniRoute hufanya moja kwa moja
translator.featureReasoningCacheDesc: Huingiza upya reasoning_content kwa miundo ya modi ya kufikiri (DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2, Qwen) wateja wanapoiondoa kwenye historia ya mazungumzo.
translator.featureSchemaCoercionDesc: Hurekebisha miundo ya zana iliyovunjika: huongeza Sifa za ziada zinazokosekana, husafisha maelezo marefu, hurekebisha vitu vilivyowekwa kwenye viota.
translator.featureRoleNormalizationDesc: Msanidi wa Ramani→mfumo kwa malengo yasiyo ya OpenAI. Mfumo wa Ramani→mtumiaji wa miundo ambayo haiauni jukumu la mfumo.
translator.featureToolCallIds: Kurekebisha Kitambulisho cha Simu ya Zana
translator.featureToolCallIdsDesc: Huzalisha vitambulisho vya kipekee vya tool_call inapokosekana. Inasawazisha hadi umbizo la chati 9 kwa watoa huduma kama vile Mistral.
translator.featureMissingToolResponseDesc: Huingiza ujumbe_matokeo tupu wateja wanapotuma simu_za_bila majibu yanayolingana.
translator.featureThinkingBudgetDesc: Inasimamia usanidi wa kufikiria kiotomatiki. Huondoa vigezo vya kufikiri wakati ujumbe wa mwisho hautokani na mtumiaji.
translator.featureDirectPaths: Njia za Tafsiri za moja kwa moja
translator.featureDirectPathsDesc: Baadhi ya jozi za umbizo (Claude→Gemini) zina vifasiri vya moja kwa moja ambavyo vinakwepa kitovu cha OpenAI, na hivyo kutoa matokeo sahihi zaidi.
translator.featureImageMappingDesc: Hutafsiri kanuni za vipimo vya picha kati ya miundo ya API (k.m., viwango vya maelezo ya OpenAI → vipimo vya Gemini).
translator.inputPlaceholder: Paste a request body here or select a template below...

translator.testBenchDescription: Run predefined scenarios (Simple Chat, Tool Calling, etc.) to verify translation and provider compatibility. Select a source format and target provider, then run all tests to see a compatibility percentage. Use this to find which features work across providers.

landing.heroDescription: AI endpoint proxy with web dashboard - A JavaScript port of CLIProxyAPI. Works seamlessly with Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cline, RooCode, and other CLI tools.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Everything you need to manage your AI infrastructure in one place, built for scale.
landing.featureUnifiedEndpointDesc: Access all providers via a single standard API URL.
landing.featureEasySetupDesc: Get up and running in minutes with npx command.
landing.featureModelFallbackDesc: Automatically switch providers on failure or high latency.
landing.featureUsageTrackingDesc: Detailed analytics and cost monitoring across all models.
landing.featureOAuthApiKeysDesc: Securely manage credentials in one vault.
landing.featureCloudSyncDesc: Sync your configurations across devices instantly.
landing.featureCliSupportDesc: Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cline, Cursor, and more.
landing.featureDashboardDesc: Visual dashboard for real-time traffic analysis.
landing.howItWorksDescription: Data flows seamlessly from your application through our intelligent routing layer to the best provider for the job.
landing.howItWorksStep1Description: Your requests start from your favorite tools or our unified SDK. Just change the base URL.
landing.howItWorksStep2Description: Our engine analyzes the prompt, checks provider health, and routes for lowest latency or cost.
landing.howItWorksStep3Description: The request is fulfilled by OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, or others instantly.
landing.getStartedDescription: Install OmniRoute, configure your providers via web dashboard, and start routing AI requests.
landing.installStepDescription: Run npx command to start the server instantly
landing.openDashboardStepDescription: Configure providers and API keys via web interface
landing.configureProvidersNote: 📝 Configure providers in dashboard or use environment variables
landing.footerTagline: The unified endpoint for AI generation. Connect, route, and manage your AI providers with ease.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to Simplify Your AI Infrastructure?
landing.ctaDescription: Join developers who are streamlining their AI integrations with OmniRoute. Open source and free to start.

docs.deployElectronText: Endesha OmniRoute kama programu asilia ya eneo-kazi kwenye Windows, macOS, na Linux.
docs.deployDockerText: Usambazaji wa vyombo na Docker Compose; tayari kwa mkusanyiko wa uzalishaji na Kubernetes.

docs.deployFlyText: Sambaza hadi Fly.io edge wakati wa utekelezaji kwa fly.toml moja na amri moja ya kusambaza.

docs.featureRoutingText: Route requests to 30+ AI providers through a single OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Supports chat, responses, audio, and image APIs.
docs.featureCombosText: Create model combos with fallback chains and balancing strategies: round-robin, priority, random, least-used, and cost-optimized.
docs.featureUsageText: Real-time token counting, cost calculation per provider/model, and detailed usage breakdown by API key and account.
docs.featureAnalyticsText: Visual analytics with charts for requests, tokens, errors, latency, costs, and model popularity over time.
docs.featureHealthText: Live health checks, provider status, circuit breaker states, and automatic rate limit detection with exponential backoff.
docs.featureCliText: Manage IDE configurations, export/import backups, discover codex profiles, and configure settings from the dashboard.
docs.featureSecurityText: API key authentication, IP filtering, prompt injection guard, domain policies, session management, and audit logging.
docs.featureCloudSyncText: Sync your configuration to Cloudflare Workers for remote access with encrypted credentials and automatic failover.
docs.useCaseSingleEndpointText: Point clients to one base URL and route by model prefix (for example: gh/, cc/, kr/, openai/).
docs.useCaseFallbackTitle: Fallback and model switching with combos
docs.useCaseFallbackText: Create combo models in Dashboard and keep client config stable while providers rotate internally.
docs.useCaseUsageVisibilityText: Track tokens and cost by provider, account, and API key in Usage and Analytics tabs.
docs.clientCursorBullet2: OAuth connection - login from the Providers page.
docs.clientWindsurfBullet1: Use OmniRoute as an OpenAI-compatible base URL and keep explicit provider prefixes for deterministic routing.
docs.clientWindsurfBullet2: Point models to `/v1/chat/completions` for general traffic and preserve `/v1/responses` for Codex-style flows.
docs.clientWindsurfBullet3: Use Dashboard -> CLI Tools for a ready-made Windsurf configuration guide.
docs.clientClineBullet1: Cline works best with explicit provider/model prefixes so the router never has to guess the backend.
docs.clientClineBullet2: Use `/v1/chat/completions` for general models and reuse the same OmniRoute base URL across different accounts.
docs.clientClineBullet3: Use the Providers dashboard to validate OAuth/API key before debugging Cline runtime issues.
docs.clientKimiBullet1: Use OmniRoute as a stable base URL while rotating accounts or provider combos underneath.
docs.clientKimiBullet2: Prefer prefixed models in coding flows so fallback and audit trail remain explicit.
docs.clientKimiBullet3: Use `/v1/responses` when you want native Responses-style routing for tool-using clients.
docs.protocolsDescription: OmniRoute exposes two operational protocols in addition to OpenAI-compatible APIs: MCP for tool execution and A2A for agent-to-agent workflows.
docs.protocolMcpDesc: Use MCP over stdio to let clients discover and call OmniRoute tools with audit visibility.
docs.protocolMcpStep2: Point your MCP client to stdio transport.
docs.protocolA2aDesc: Use A2A JSON-RPC to submit tasks synchronously or via SSE streaming.
docs.protocolTroubleshooting1: If MCP status is offline, verify the stdio process is running and heartbeat file is updating.
docs.protocolTroubleshooting2: If A2A tasks stay in `working`, inspect `/api/a2a/tasks/:id` and stream events for terminal state.
docs.protocolTroubleshooting3: Use `/dashboard/mcp` and `/dashboard/a2a` for operational controls and audit visibility.

legal.privacyMetadataDescription: Privacy policy for the OmniRoute AI API proxy router.
legal.termsMetadataDescription: Terms of service for the OmniRoute AI API proxy router.
legal.privacySection1Text: OmniRoute is designed as a local-first application. All data processing and storage occurs entirely on your machine. There is no centralized server collecting your information.
legal.privacyDataStoredIn: The following data is stored locally in
legal.privacyDataProviderConfigurationsDesc: connection URLs, provider types, and priority settings
legal.privacyDataApiKeysDesc: encrypted and stored locally for authenticating with AI providers
legal.privacyDataUsageLogsDesc: request counts, token usage, model names, timestamps, and response times
legal.privacyDataApplicationSettingsDesc: theme preferences, routing strategy, and combo configurations
legal.privacySection3Text: OmniRoute does not collect telemetry, analytics, or crash reports. No data is sent to us or any third party. Your usage patterns, API calls, and configurations remain entirely private.
legal.privacySection4Text: When you make API calls through OmniRoute, your requests are forwarded to the AI providers you have configured (for example: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google). These providers have their own privacy policies that govern how they handle your data. Please review:
legal.privacySection5Text: If you enable the optional cloud sync feature, provider configurations and API keys may be transmitted to a configured cloud endpoint. This feature is disabled by default and requires explicit opt-in.
legal.privacyLoggingIntro: Request logs can be configured through the dashboard settings. You can:
legal.privacySection7TextStart: Since all data is stored locally, you have full control. You can delete your data at any time by removing the
legal.privacySection7TextEnd: directory or using the database backup and restore features in the dashboard.
legal.termsSection1Text: OmniRoute is a local-first AI API proxy router that operates entirely on your machine. It routes requests to multiple AI providers with load balancing, failover, and usage tracking.
legal.termsResponsibilityApiKeys: You are solely responsible for managing your own API keys and credentials for third-party AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.).
legal.termsResponsibilityCompliance: You must comply with the terms of service of each AI provider whose API you access through OmniRoute.
legal.termsResponsibilitySecurity: You are responsible for the security of your local OmniRoute installation, including setting a password and restricting network access.
legal.termsSection3Text: OmniRoute acts as an intermediary proxy. API calls sent to OmniRoute are translated and forwarded to your configured AI providers. OmniRoute does not modify the content of your requests or responses beyond the necessary protocol translation.
legal.termsDataStoredLocally: All data is stored locally on your machine in a SQLite database.
legal.termsNoTransmission: OmniRoute does not transmit any data to external servers unless you explicitly enable cloud sync features.
legal.termsDataLocationText: Usage logs, API keys, and configuration are stored in
legal.termsSection5Text: OmniRoute is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. We are not responsible for any costs incurred through API usage, service disruptions, or data loss. Always maintain backups of your configuration.
legal.termsSection6Text: OmniRoute is open-source software. You are free to inspect, modify, and distribute it under the terms of its license.

proxyRegistry.bulkImportDescription: Bandika wasifu wa proksi kwa kutumia umbizo lililotenganishwa na bomba. Wakala mmoja kwa kila mstari. Wawakilishi waliopo (mwenyeji sawa + mlango) watasasishwa.

quotaShare.title: Quota Sharing
quotaShare.description: Share provider quotas across API keys with % limits
quotaShare.betaDescription: Configuration is saved in localStorage (not yet persisted on the server). Per-request cap enforcement is not yet wired into the proxy pipeline. This screen lets you design and visualize the quota split; real enforcement will land in a future iteration with DB persistence and upstream call interception.
quotaShare.emptyDescription: Create a pool to assign API keys to share a provider's quota window with % allocations.

quotaShare.betaConfigSavedSuffix: (bado haijaendelea kwenye seva). Utekelezaji wa kikomo kwa kila ombi bado haujaunganishwa kwenye bomba la seva mbadala. Skrini hii hukuruhusu kubuni na kuona taswira ya mgawanyiko wa sehemu; utekelezaji halisi utatua katika marudio ya siku zijazo na usugu wa DB na uzuiaji wa simu wa juu.
quotaShare.conceptTitle: Jinsi Ugavi wa Quota unavyofanya kazi
quotaShare.conceptIntro: Ugavi wa Quota hugawanya quota ya mtoa huduma kati ya funguo nyingi za API kwa kutumia usawa wa kuhifadhi kazi: kila ufunguo hupokea sehemu inayolingana lakini unaweza kukopa kutoka kwa salio la bure bila kuzidi kikomo cha jumla.
quotaShare.conceptFairShare: Usawa: kila ufunguo hupokea quota inayolingana na uzito wake uliosanidiwa
quotaShare.conceptBorrowing: Kukopa: funguo zinaweza kutumia salio la bure kutoka kwa zingine bila kukiuka kikomo
quotaShare.conceptGlobalCap: Kikomo kigumu cha jumla: kikomo kamili cha mtoa huduma hakizidiwi kamwe
quotaShare.conceptWindows: Muda: saa 5, kila saa, kila siku, kila wiki, kila mwezi — kila moja inafuatiliwa kwa kujitegemea
quotaShare.conceptKeyHowTitle: Kuwezesha ufunguo kwa ajili ya quota
quotaShare.conceptKeyHowDesc: Unda ufunguo kama kawaida kwenye Funguo za API — unaonekana kwenye hatua ya ufunguo ya kisakinishi kiotomatiki. Weka alama ya tiki kwenye Exclusive hapo ili kuufanya kuwa wa quota pekee. Hakuna hatua tofauti ya kuwezesha.
quotaShare.conceptExclusiveDesc: Ufunguo wa kipekee huona/hutumia tu mifano ya quotaShared-* ya kundi — kila mfano mwingine hufichwa kutoka kwa /v1/models zake na kuzuiwa.
quotaShare.migratedFromLocalStorageNotice: Makundi yamehamishwa kwa mafanikio kutoka localStorage.
quotaShare.stackedBarTitle: Vipande kwa kila ufunguo wa API
quotaShare.wizardStep1Subtitle: Teua akaunti ya mtoa huduma ambayo kundi hili litashiriki quota kwa ajili yake, weka jina na sera mbadala.
quotaShare.wizardStep2Subtitle: Bainisha vipimo vya mpango wa kota (kipimo, dirisha, kikomo) kwa muunganisho uliochaguliwa. Acha bila kubadilisha ili kuweka mipangilio ya sasa.
quotaShare.wizardStep3Subtitle: Kabidhi funguo za API kwenye kidimbwi hiki kwa ugawaji wa asilimia ya uzito % na vikomo vya hiari.
quotaShare.wizardDimensionsEditedNotice: Vipimo vimehaririwa — vitahifadhiwa kama ubatilishaji wa mwongozo wakati kidimbwi kitakapoundwa.
quotaShare.wizardExclusiveHint: Inapowezeshwa, funguo hizi za API zitaruhusiwa tu kutumia mifano ya mtandaoni ya kidimbwi hiki (maridhiano ya allowedQuotas hutumiwa wakati wa kuhifadhi).
quotaShare.wizardPreviewLabel: Hakiki ya majina ya mifano pepe
quotaShare.wizardAdditionalConnectionsNote: Viunganishi vya ziada vinatumia vikomo vyao chaguomsingi vya katalogi (vinaweza kuhaririwa baadaye).
quotaShare.groupAllocationNote: Ugawaji unatumika kwa vidimbwi vyote katika kikundi hiki kupitia safu ya kota iliyoshirikiwa.
quotaShare.endpointsHint: Ita mifano hii pepe kwa ufunguo wowote uliotengwa — urutishaji + kota hushughulikiwa kwa kila kikundi.
quotaShare.betaText: Quota Share inafanya kazi lakini hitilafu zinatarajiwa. Umepata moja? Tafadhali iripoti.

omni-auth.name: Uthibitishaji
omni-auth.description: Dhibiti uthibitishaji wa ufunguo wa API na tokeni za kipindi. Anzia hapa ili kuthibitisha maombi kupitia tokeni ya Bearer, kupata vidakuzi vya kipindi, na kusanidi mahitaji ya kuingia kwa API ya OmniRoute.

omni-providers.name: Watoa Huduma
omni-providers.description: Dhibiti miunganisho ya watoa huduma, funguo za API, mtiririko wa OAuth, na majaribio ya muunganisho kupitia REST API. Orodhesha, ongeza, sasisha, ondoa, na jaribu miunganisho ya watoa huduma wa AI (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, na 160+).

omni-models.name: Modeli
omni-models.description: Dadisi modeli za AI zinazopatikana katika watoa huduma wote waliowekwa. Orodhesha modeli, tatua lakabu za modeli, na uvinjari katalogi kamili ya modeli ikijumuisha lahaja mahususi za watoa huduma.

omni-combos-routing.name: Michanganyiko na Uelekezaji
omni-combos-routing.description: Unda na udhibiti michanganyiko ya uelekezaji yenye mikakati 14 (kipaumbele, uzani, round-robin, Auto-combo, n.k.). Sanidi minyororo ya dharura, jaribu matokeo ya uelekezaji, na urejeshe vipimo vya mchanganyiko.

omni-api-keys.name: Funguo za API
omni-api-keys.description: Unda, orodhesha, zungusha, na ubatilishe funguo za API za OmniRoute. Dhibiti upeo wa kila ufunguo, vikomo vya matumizi, na muda wa mwisho wa matumizi. Funguo hudhibiti ufikiaji wa vituo vyote vya proksi na usimamizi.

omni-usage-logs.name: Matumizi na Kumbukumbu
omni-usage-logs.description: Fikia kumbukumbu za kina za miito na uchanganuzi wa matumizi. Chuja kulingana na mtoa huduma, modeli, masafa ya muda, hali, na gharama. Hamisha kumbukumbu na ujumlishe matumizi ya tokeni katika miunganisho yote.

omni-budget.name: Bajeti na Vikomo vya Kasi
omni-budget.description: Sanidi vikomo vya matumizi, viwango vya tokeni, na sera za kikomo cha kasi kwa kila ufunguo wa API au kimataifa. Kagua matumizi ya sasa na utekeleze udhibiti wa gharama kwa watoa huduma wote.

omni-settings.name: Mipangilio
omni-settings.description: Soma na usasishe mipangilio ya jumla ya programu: vidokezo vya mfumo, bajeti ya kufikiri, vichujio vya IP, sheria za mzigo wa data, chaguomsingi za mchanganyiko, na usanidi wa kuhitaji kuingia.

omni-proxies.name: Usanidi wa Proksi
omni-proxies.description: Sanidi proksi za HTTP/HTTPS/SOCKS kwa maombi ya mtoa huduma wa juu. Weka sheria za proksi kwa kila mtoa huduma au za jumla, jaribu muunganisho, na udhibiti mzunguko wa proksi.

omni-cache.name: Kache
omni-cache.description: Dhibiti kache ya majibu ya LLM. Tazama takwimu za kache, futa maingizo, sanidi sera za TTL, na udhibiti vizingiti vya uhifadhi wa kache kulingana na ufanano wa kisemantiki.

omni-compression.name: Mgandamizo
omni-compression.description: Sanidi hali za mgandamizo za RTK (matokeo ya amri), Caveman (nathari), na zilizopangwa kwa tabaka. Dhibiti vifurushi vya lugha, sheria maalum, na jaribu mgandamizo wa vidokezo unaopunguza tokeni kwa 60–90%.

omni-context-rtk.name: Muktadha na RTK
omni-context-rtk.description: Sanidi vichujio vya RTK, sheria za uhandisi wa muktadha, na mipangilio ya upeanaji wa muktadha. Jaribu mgandamizo kwa sampuli halisi za vidokezo na udhibiti mifereji ya mabadiliko ya muktadha.

omni-resilience.name: Ustahimilivu na Ufuatiliaji
omni-resilience.description: Fuatilia afya ya mtoa huduma, hali za kikatamzunguko, vipimo vya muda wa kusubiri vya p50/p95/p99, na arifa za ulinzi wa bajeti. Kagua vipindi vya kupumzisha muunganisho na kufungiwa kwa modeli katika muda halisi.

omni-cli-tools.name: Zana za CLI
omni-cli-tools.description: Dhibiti ujumuishaji wa zana za CLI unaofunuliwa kupitia API. Orodhesha, usanidi, na uanzishe programu-jalizi za zana za CLI zinazopanua eneo la otomatiki la OmniRoute.

omni-tunnels.name: Taneli
omni-tunnels.description: Unda na udhibiti taneli salama (ngrok, Cloudflare Tunnel, maalum) ili kufunua OmniRoute kwenye mtandao wa intaneti au kushiriki ufikiaji na ejenti za mbali na mifereji ya CI.

omni-sync-cloud.name: Ulandanishaji wa Wingu
omni-sync-cloud.description: Landanisha usanidi wa OmniRoute, miunganisho ya watoa huduma, na mipangilio kwenda/kutoka kwenye hifadhi ya wingu. Dhibiti uthibitishaji wa wafanyakazi wa wingu na shabaha za chelezo za mbali.

omni-db-backups.name: Hifadhidata na Chelezo
omni-db-backups.description: Anzisha chelezo za mfumo, rejesha kutoka kwenye faili za chelezo, na udhibiti mzunguko wa maisha wa hifadhidata ya SQLite. Inasaidia mikakati ya kuhamisha, kuingiza, na picha za haraka za nyongeza.

omni-webhooks.name: Webhooks
omni-webhooks.description: Sajili, orodhesha, jaribu, na uondoe vituo vya mwisho vya webhook. Sanidi usajili wa matukio (request.completed, provider.error, budget.exceeded, n.k.) na udhibiti majaribio tena ya uwasilishaji.

omni-mcp.name: Seva ya MCP
omni-mcp.description: Unganisha kwenye seva ya OmniRoute MCP (zana 37, usafirishaji 3: SSE/stdio/HTTP). Inajumuisha uelekezaji, kache, mgandamizo, kumbukumbu, ujuzi, watoa huduma, na zana za ukaguzi kwenye mawanda 16 ya ruhusa.

omni-agents-a2a.name: Ejenti na Itifaki ya A2A
omni-agents-a2a.description: Muingiliano na OmniRoute kupitia itifaki ya ejenti-kwa-ejenti ya JSON-RPC 2.0. Ujuzi 6 wa ndani wa A2A: smart-routing, quota-management, provider-discovery, cost-analysis, health-report, list-capabilities.

omni-version-manager.name: Kidhibiti cha Toleo
omni-version-manager.description: Sakinisha, anzisha, simamisha, anzisha upya, na usasishe huduma zilizopachikwa (9Router, CLIProxyAPI). Fuatilia hali ya huduma, pata kumbukumbu za matukio, na usanidi uanzishaji wa kiotomatiki kwa vituo vya mwisho vya huduma za ndani pekee.

omni-inference.name: Udadisi (Inayoendana na OpenAI)
omni-inference.description: Vituo vya mwisho vya udadisi vya msingi vinavyoendana na OpenAI: ukamilishaji wa soga, upachikaji, picha, sauti (TTS/STT), ulinganifu, kupanga upya, na Responses API. Eneo la msingi la ujumuishaji kwa ejenti za AI.

cli-serve.name: CLI: Serve
cli-serve.description: Anzisha, simamisha, na uanzishe upya seva ya OmniRoute kutoka kwenye CLI. Dhibiti hali ya daemon, usanidi wa mlango, urejeshi wa kiotomatiki, ujumuishaji wa trei ya mfumo, na njia ya mkato ya kufungua dashibodi.

cli-health.name: CLI: Health
cli-health.description: Angalia afya ya seva, hali ya vipengele, na vipimo vya moja kwa moja kutoka kwenye CLI. Endesha `health`, `health components`, na `health watch` kwa ajili ya dashibodi ya wakati halisi ya vivunja mzunguko na hali ya mtoa huduma.

cli-providers.name: CLI: Providers
cli-providers.description: Dhibiti miunganisho ya watoa huduma kutoka kwenye CLI: orodhesha watoa huduma wanaopatikana/waliosanidiwa, ongeza, jaribu, jaribu-yote, thibitisha, zungusha funguo za API, na uangalie vipimo vya kila mtoa huduma.

cli-keys.name: CLI: API Keys
cli-keys.description: Unda, orodhesha, zungusha, na ubatilishe funguo za API za OmniRoute kutoka kwenye CLI. Dhibiti mtiririko wa OAuth kwa uthibitishaji wa mtoa huduma na ukague mawanda ya funguo na muda wa kuisha.

cli-models.name: CLI: Models
cli-models.description: Uliza mifano ya AI inayopatikana, orodhesha majina mbadala ya mifano, na vinjari katalogi kamili ya mifano kutoka kwenye CLI. Chuja kwa mtoa huduma, tafuta kwa uwezo, na utatue lahaja za majina ya mifano.

cli-chat.name: CLI: Chat
cli-chat.description: Tuma ukamilishaji wa soga, tiririsha majibu, na uanzishe kipindi shirikishi cha REPL kutoka kwenye CLI. Inasaidia watoa huduma wote wa OmniRoute, uelekezaji wa mchanganyiko, na usanidi wa kidokezo cha mfumo.

cli-routing.name: CLI: Routing & Combos
cli-routing.description: Unda, orodhesha, sasisha, na ufute mchanganyiko wa uelekezaji kutoka kwenye CLI. Jaribu mikakati ya uelekezaji, kagua vipimo vya mchanganyiko, na usanidi minyororo ya dharura kwa njia shirikishi.

cli-resilience.name: CLI: Resilience & Quotas
cli-resilience.description: Kagua na udhibiti hali za vivunja mzunguko, muda wa kupumzika kwa miunganisho, mipaka ya upendeleo, na viwango vya kurudi nyuma kutoka kwenye CLI. Weka upya watoa huduma waliokwama na usanidi vizingiti vya ustahimilivu.

cli-compression.name: CLI: Compression
cli-compression.description: Sanidi na ujaribu mgandamizo wa kidokezo kutoka kwenye CLI. Dhibiti vichujio vya RTK, sheria za Caveman, hali za mgandamizo zilizopangwa, na uhakiki matokeo ya mgandamizo kwa kutumia vidokezo halisi.

cli-contexts.name: CLI: Contexts & Sessions
cli-contexts.description: Dhibiti usanidi wa uhandisi wa muktadha, seti za vichujio vya RTK, na vipindi vya mazungumzo kutoka kwenye CLI. Tuma mipangilio ya uwasilishaji wa muktadha na ukague mifereji ya muktadha inayofanya kazi.

cli-cost-usage.name: CLI: Cost & Usage
cli-cost-usage.description: Angalia mchanganuo wa gharama, matumizi ya tokeni, na kumbukumbu za simu kutoka kwenye CLI. Chuja kwa mtoa huduma, mfano, au muda wa tarehe. Hamisha ripoti za matumizi na ukague matumizi kwa kila muunganisho.

cli-mcp.name: CLI: MCP
cli-mcp.description: Kagua hali ya seva ya MCP, orodhesha zana na upeo uliosajiliwa, endesha wito wa zana, na udhibiti kumbukumbu za ukaguzi za MCP kutoka kwenye CLI.

cli-a2a.name: CLI: Itifaki ya A2A
cli-a2a.description: Muingiliano na seva ya OmniRoute A2A kutoka kwenye CLI. Tuma kazi, kagua historia ya utekelezaji wa ujuzi, na ujaribu itifaki ya wakala-kwa-wakala ya JSON-RPC 2.0 kwa mwingiliano.

cli-tunnel.name: CLI: Tunnels
cli-tunnel.description: Anzisha na usimamishe miunganisho ya tunnel (ngrok, Cloudflare, maalum) kutoka kwenye CLI. Kagua URL za tunnel zinazofanya kazi, usanidi uthibitishaji, na ujaribu ufikiaji wa nje.

cli-backup-sync.name: CLI: Hifadhi Nakala na Usawazishaji
cli-backup-sync.description: Hifadhi nakala na urejeshe data ya OmniRoute kutoka kwenye CLI. Anzisha picha za nyongeza (snapshots), sawazisha kwenye hifadhi ya wingu, dhibiti ratiba za kuhifadhi nakala, na urejeshe kutoka kwenye faili za kumbukumbu.

cli-policy-audit.name: CLI: Sera na Ukaguzi
cli-policy-audit.description: Kagua kumbukumbu za ukaguzi, dhibiti sera za ufikiaji, angalia data ya telemetri, na uhakiki historia ya maombi kutoka kwenye CLI. Chuja kwa aina ya tukio, mtumiaji, au muda wa muda kwa mtiririko wa kazi wa kufuata sheria.

cli-batches.name: CLI: Makundi na Faili
cli-batches.description: Wasilisha na ufuatilie kazi za makundi ya makisio (batch inference) kutoka kwenye CLI. Pakia na udhibiti faili kwa ajili ya usindikaji wa makundi, pata matokeo, na unganisha mabomba ya makundi na mitiririko ya kazi ya CI/CD.

cli-eval.name: CLI: Tathmini
cli-eval.description: Unda na uendeshe seti za tathmini, tazama maendeleo ya kipimo cha utendaji mubashara, angalia kadi za alama, linganisha utendaji wa mfano, na unganisha uendeshaji wa tathmini na mitiririko ya kazi ya CI kutoka kwenye CLI.

cli-plugins-skills.name: CLI: Programu-jalizi, Ujuzi na Kumbukumbu
cli-plugins-skills.description: Dhibiti Ujuzi wa Omni (orodhesha, sakinisha, jaribu, ondoa), programu-jalizi (unda, usanidi), na kumbukumbu ya kudumu (tafuta, ongeza, futa) kutoka kwenye CLI.

cli-setup.name: CLI: Usanidi na Uwekaji Mipangilio
cli-setup.description: Endesha usanidi wa kwanza, usanidi mipangilio ya kimataifa ya CLI, dhibiti vigeuzi vya mazingira, angalia sasisho, na usanidi uanzishaji otomatiki kupitia amri za usanidi na uwekaji mipangilio za CLI.

cli-skill-collector.name: CLI: Mkusanyaji wa Ujuzi wa Wakala
cli-skill-collector.description: Tambua zana za usimbaji za CLI zilizosakinishwa (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Cline na zaidi), tafuta GitHub kwa ujuzi unaolingana wa wakala, na uzisakinishe kwenye zana zilizotambuliwa kupitia API zilizojengwa ndani za OmniRoute.

config-codex-cli.name: Usanidi: Codex CLI
config-codex-cli.description: Mtiririko wa kazi wa wakala wa hatua kwa hatua ili kusanidi OpenAI Codex CLI kwenye mashine yoyote (Linux, macOS, Windows) ili kutumia OmniRoute kama mfumo wa nyuma unaoendana na OpenAI. Inatambua OS na shell, inaandika config.toml na wasifu 7 zilizotajwa, inaweka vigeuzi vya mazingira, na inathibitisha usanidi.

omni-github-skills.name: Ugunduzi wa Ujuzi wa GitHub
omni-github-skills.description: Tafuta, toa alama, kagua, na uagize ujuzi wa wakala kutoka kwenye hazina za GitHub zilizo na SKILL.md, CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, na faili zinazofanana za ujuzi wa wakala. Gundua ujuzi wa jamii katika kategoria 160+ za watoa huduma, tathmini umuhimu kwa alama za kiheuristiki, kagua programu hasidi au siri zilizowekwa ngumu (hardcoded secrets), na usakinishe kwenye saraka za wakala za Hermes, Claude Code, Gemini CLI, au OpenCode.

agentSkills.pageSubtitle: Fundisha wakala wako kuendesha OmniRoute — maeneo 23 ya API + familia 21 za CLI

agent.title: Ujuzi wa Wakala — Yanayotoka
agent.description: Ujuzi wa Wakala ni hati za SKILL.md zinazoweza kusomwa na mashine ambazo mawakala wa nje wa AI (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot…) huzichukua kutoka GitHub ili kujifunza jinsi ya kuendesha OmniRoute kupitia REST au CLI. Zinasomwa na wakala, hazitekelezwi na OmniRoute.

omni.title: Ujuzi wa Omni — Yanayoingia
omni.description: Ujuzi wa Omni ni zana za sandbox ambazo OmniRoute huingiza kwenye muktadha wa mfano kwenye kila ombi. Zinatekelezwa na OmniRoute, hazisomwi na wakala.

whatIs.label: Ni nini
whatIs.agent: SKILL.md inayoweza kusomwa na mashine inayomfundisha wakala wa nje kuendesha OmniRoute
whatIs.omni: Zana zinazoweza kutekelezeka ambazo OmniRoute huingiza kama zana kwenye maombi ya LLM

direction.label: Mwelekeo
direction.agent: Yanayotoka — wakala wa nje anajifunza kudhibiti OmniRoute
direction.omni: Yanayoingia — OmniRoute inatoa zana kwa mifano inayopita ndani yake

executor.label: Mtekelezaji
executor.agent: Wakala wa nje (husoma markdown → hutenda kupitia API/CLI)

tagline.label: Kaulimbiu
tagline.omni: Patia miundo ya OmniRoute zana zinazoweza kutekelezwa

agentSkills.mcpPrompt: Ongeza endpoint hii ya MCP kwenye wakala wako ili kuupa zana 37 za OmniRoute.
agentSkills.a2aPrompt: Sajili Kadi hii ya Wakala kwenye kioratibu chako ili kuwezesha ugawaji wa majukumu wa A2A.
agentSkills.previewEmpty: Chagua ujuzi ili kuhakiki nyaraka zake.

agentSkills.regenerateConfirm: Hii itazalisha upya faili zote za SKILL.md zinazokosekana. Endelea?

freeProviderRankingsPage.title: Viwango vya Watoa Huduma wa Bure
freeProviderRankingsPage.subtitle: Watoa huduma bora wa bure walioorodheshwa kwa alama za ELO za miundo kutoka kwenye mbao za wanaoongoza za Arena AI
freeProviderRankingsPage.emptyState: Hakuna viwango vinavyopatikana bado. Data ya Arena ELO husawazishwa wakati wa kuanzisha (kila siku) — angalia tena hivi karibuni, au anzisha usawazishaji wa mikono. Zima Arena ELO Sync katika Feature Flags au weka ARENA_ELO_SYNC_ENABLED=false ili kujiondoa.
freeProviderRankingsPage.filterAvailableOnlyHelp: Ficha watoa huduma ambao miunganisho yao yote imewekewa kikomo cha kasi au imeishiwa na kiwango cha matumizi.
freeProviderRankingsPage.configuredOnlyHint: Onyesha tu watoa huduma walio na miunganisho inayotumika
freeProviderRankingsPage.noConfiguredProviders: Hakuna watoa huduma waliosanidiwa waliopatikana. Ongeza muunganisho wa mtoa huduma kwanza.
freeProviderRankingsPage.sortTypeFirstHelp: Panga kwa juhudi za kujisajili (Bila Kujisajili → Kuingia kwa OAuth → Ufunguo wa API), ukizingatia mpangilio wa ubora ndani ya kila kikundi
freeProviderRankingsPage.typeLegend: Bila Kujisajili = hakuna usanidi · Kuingia kwa OAuth = ingia ukitumia akaunti yako mwenyewe · Ufunguo wa API = leta ufunguo wako mwenyewe au kiwango cha bure cha mtoa huduma huyo

discovery.title: Ugunduzi wa Mtoa Huduma
discovery.subtitle: Changanua watoa huduma kwa mbinu za ufikiaji bila malipo/bila kikomo na ukague matokeo. Ya hiari, ya ndani pekee.
discovery.localOnlyNote: Zana hii ni ya ndani pekee (loopback). Uchanganuzi unaendeshwa kutoka kwa mashine hii na hauwezi kufikiwa kwa mbali kamwe.
discovery.deleteConfirm: Futa ugunduzi wa {provider}? Hatua hii haiwezi kutenduliwa.
discovery.emptyDescription: Endesha uchanganuzi hapo juu ili kutafuta mbinu za ufikiaji bila malipo kwenye mtoa huduma.

noAuthProvider.title: Hakuna uthibitishaji unaohitajika
noAuthProvider.description: Mtoa huduma huyu yuko tayari kutumika mara moja — hakuna kujisajili au ufunguo wa API unaohitajika.
noAuthProvider.accountDescription: Tayari kutumika — hakuna kujisajili kunakohitajika. Ongeza akaunti kwa ajili ya mzunguko wa kikomo cha kiwango.
noAuthProvider.autoGeneratedAccount: Inatumia akaunti iliyotengenezwa kiotomatiki. Teua “{addLabel}” kwa ajili ya mzunguko wa kikomo cha kiwango.
noAuthProvider.noSavedProxies: Hakuna proksi zilizohifadhiwa — ongeza moja katika Mipangilio → Proksi
noAuthProvider.noSavedProxiesError: Hakuna proksi zilizohifadhiwa zilizopatikana. Ongeza proksi katika Mipangilio → Proksi kwanza.

featureFlags.title: Bendera za Vipengele
featureFlags.restartRequiredCount: {count, plural, one {Badiliko # linahitaji} other {Mabadiliko # yanahitaji}} kuanzisha upya seva ili kuanza kutumika.
featureFlags.restartRequiredDescription: Bendera hizi hutumika tu baada ya mchakato kupakiwa upya. Anzisha upya sasa au endelea kuhariri — bendera zinazosubiri zitasalia kwenye foleni hadi utakapothibitisha.
featureFlags.restartViewDescription: Bendera hizi huanza kutumika tu baada ya seva kuanzishwa upya. Zibadilishe kama bendera nyingine yoyote — mabadiliko huhifadhiwa mara moja, lakini thamani mpya husomwa tu wakati wa kuanza kwa mchakato. Tumia bango la Anzisha Upya Seva hapo juu ili kutekeleza.
featureFlags.noSearchResults: Hakuna bendera zinazolingana na utafutaji wako
featureFlags.confirmResetOverrides: Je, ungependa kuweka upya ubatilishaji wote wa DB {count}?

REQUIRE_API_KEY.description: Hitaji ufunguo wa API kwa maombi yote yanayoingia.

INPUT_SANITIZER_ENABLED.description: Wezesha usafishaji wa data iliyoingizwa kwa maombi yote.

INJECTION_GUARD_MODE.description: Weka hali ya ulinzi dhidi ya prompt-injection.

PII_REDACTION_ENABLED.description: Ficha taarifa zinazoweza kumtambulisha mtu binafsi kutoka kwenye maombi.

PII_RESPONSE_SANITIZATION.description: Safisha taarifa zinazoweza kumtambulisha mtu binafsi katika majibu ya mtoa huduma.

PII_RESPONSE_SANITIZATION_MODE.description: Chagua jinsi PII ya majibu inavyoshughulikiwa: redact huibadilisha, warn huirekodi tu kwenye kumbukumbu, block hukataa jibu, na off huzima usafishaji.

OUTBOUND_SSRF_GUARD_ENABLED.description: Zuia maombi ya nje kwenda kwenye masafa ya IP ya faragha au ya ndani.

ALLOW_API_KEY_REVEAL.description: Ruhusu watumiaji wa dashibodi waliothibitishwa kuonyesha funguo za API zilizohifadhiwa badala ya kuona thamani zilizofichwa pekee.

ENABLE_TLS_FINGERPRINT.description: Wezesha hali ya usiri ya alama ya vidole ya TLS.

PROXY_AUTO_SELECT_ENABLED.description: Wakati hakuna seva mbadala iliyogawiwa kwenye muunganisho, chagua kiotomatiki seva mbadala ya kwanza ya sajili inayofanya kazi. Imezimwa kwa chaguomsingi kwa sababu vinginevyo seva mbadala moja ya sajili inakuwa mbadala wa kimataifa kwa trafiki yote (#3332).

OMNIROUTE_CONTROL_PLANE_PROXY_DIRECT_FAL.description: Ruhusu mtiririko wa OAuth na uthibitishaji wa mtoa huduma kupita seva mbadala iliyobandikwa wakati ukaguzi wa ufikiaji wa seva mbadala unapofeli. Imezimwa kwa chaguomsingi kwa sababu hii inaweza kubadilisha IP ya kutokea ya akaunti.

MITM_DISABLE_TLS_VERIFY.description: Zima uthibitishaji wa cheti cha TLS kwa seva mbadala ya MITM.

OMNIROUTE_ALLOW_PRIVATE_PROVIDER_URLS.description: Ruhusu URL za mtoa huduma zinazoelekeza kwenye mitandao ya faragha au ya ndani.

OMNIROUTE_ALLOW_LOCAL_PROVIDER_URLS.description: Ruhusu watoa huduma kwenye localhost, LAN, na masafa ya IP ya faragha. Hii inahitajika kwa mifano ya ndani inayoendana na OpenAI na imewezeshwa kwa chaguomsingi. Vituo vya mwisho vya cloud-metadata kama vile 169.254.169.254 vinasalia kuzuiwa.

ENABLE_CC_COMPATIBLE_PROVIDER.description: Wezesha hali ya mtoa huduma inayoendana na Claude Code.

TOOL_POLICY_MODE.description: Weka hali ya utekelezaji wa sera ya matumizi ya zana.

RATE_LIMIT_AUTO_ENABLE.description: Wezesha kiotomatiki ukomo wa kasi kulingana na mifumo ya matumizi.

ALLOW_MULTI_CONNECTIONS_PER_COMPAT_NODE.description: Ruhusu miunganisho mingi kwa kila nodi ya utangamano.

RESPONSES_PASSTHROUGH_DROP_COMMENTARY.description: Ondoa vipengele vya pato la awamu ya maoni ya ndani kutoka kwenye mikondo ya kupita ya Responses API kabla ya kuvituma kwa wateja. Zima alama hii ili kupokea maoni ghafi ya mkondo wa juu.

OMNIROUTE_MCP_ENFORCE_SCOPES.description: Tekeleza vizuizi vya upeo kwa ufikiaji wa zana ya MCP.

OMNIROUTE_MCP_COMPRESS_DESCRIPTIONS.description: Fupisha maelezo ya zana ya MCP ili kupunguza matumizi ya tokeni.

OMNIROUTE_ENABLE_RUNTIME_BACKGROUND_TASK.description: Wezesha usindikaji wa kazi za nyuma wakati wa uendeshaji.

OMNIROUTE_DISABLE_BACKGROUND_SERVICES.description: Zima huduma zote za nyuma, ikijumuisha uboreshaji wa upya wa viwango na ulandanishi.

OMNIROUTE_RTK_TRUST_PROJECT_FILTERS.description: Amini vichujio vya RTK vya kiwango cha mradi bila uthibitishaji.

OMNIROUTE_ENABLE_LIVE_WS.description: Anzisha seva ya WebSocket ya dashibodi ya muda halisi wakati wa kuagiza kwenye lango la loopback 20132. Weka alama kuwa 0 au false ili kuizima. Mfiduo wa LAN pia unahitaji LIVE_WS_HOST=0.0.0.0 na LIVE_WS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.

OMNIROUTE_CODEX_WS_ENABLED.description: Ruhusu Codex kutumia Responses kupitia WebSocket. Inapozimwa, Codex hurudi kwenye HTTP Responses.

OMNIROUTE_EMERGENCY_FALLBACK.description: Elekeza maombi ya bajeti iliyoisha kwa mtoa huduma na mfano mbadala wa dharura wa bure.

STREAM_RECOVERY_ENABLED.description: Jaribu tena kwa uwazi mikondo ya SSE ya mkondo wa juu iliyokatishwa kabla ya baiti zozote za jibu kumfikia mteja.

STREAM_RECOVERY_MIDSTREAM_ENABLED.description: Ruhusu urejesho wa mkondo kuomba jibu tena na kuliunganisha baada ya baiti kuwa tayari zimefikia mteja.

MODEL_CATALOG_INCLUDE_NAMES.description: Jumuisha sehemu za majina rahisi kuonyeshwa katika majibu ya /v1/models. Zima hii kwa wateja wanaokubali vitambulisho vya mfano pekee.

MODELS_CATALOG_PREFIX_MODE.description: Dhibiti viambishi awali vya kitambulisho cha mfano katika /v1/models: dual hutoa viambishi awali vya alias na canonical, alias hutoa viambishi awali vifupi pekee, na canonical hutoa vitambulisho kamili vya mtoa huduma pekee.

ARENA_ELO_SYNC_ENABLED.description: Lanisha mara kwa mara data ya ELO ya ubao wa wanaoongoza wa Arena AI kwa viwango vya akili ya mfano.

CLI_COMPAT_ALL.description: Wezesha hali ya utangamano kwa wateja wote vya CLI.

MODEL_ALIAS_COMPAT_ENABLED.description: Wezesha safu ya utangamano ya alias ya mfano.

issue.circuitOpenTitle: Kikata mzunguko cha mtoa huduma kiko wazi
issue.circuitOpenRecommendation: Thibitisha urejesho wa mkondo wa juu, kisha uweke upya kikata mzunguko cha mtoa huduma au usubiri dirisha la kujaribu tena.
issue.circuitRecoveryRecommendation: Ruhusu uchunguzi unaofuata ukamilike au uweke upya kikata mzunguko baada ya uthibitisho wa mwongozo.
issue.terminalTitle: {label} ina hali ya mwisho ya akaunti
issue.terminalRecommendation: Angalia malipo, thibitisha tena utambulisho, au ubadilishe kitambulisho kabla ya kukiamsha tena.
issue.cooldownTitle: {label} iko kwenye kipindi cha utulivu cha muda
issue.cooldownRecommendation: Subiri dirisha la kujaribu tena la mkondo wa juu au ufute kipindi cha utulivu baada ya kuthibitisha urejesho.
issue.staleErrorTitle: {label} ina hali ya hitilafu iliyopitwa na wakati
issue.staleErrorRecommendation: Futa sehemu za hitilafu zilizopitwa na wakati ili muunganisho ustahili kuelekezwa kawaida tena.
issue.inactiveRecommendation: Washa tena ikiwa tu hii haikuzimwa kimakusudi.
issue.modelLockoutRecommendation: Tatua hali ya muunganisho au uthibitishe kuwa kiwango/upatikanaji wa modeli umerejea kabla ya kufuta kufungiwa nje.
issue.quotaRecommendation: Kagua matumizi ya kiwango na uelekeze trafiki kwenye muunganisho mwingine mzuri ikihitajika.
